### 💻 Código Añadido

**src/components/Hero/Hero.astro** (+42 líneas)**

```

<section id="inicio" class="hero-container w-full relative flex justify-center items-center mt-[50px] bg-black" aria-label="Banner principal">
        alt="Detalle de soldadura representativo de Maestría del Hierro"
        width={1600}
        height={900}
        sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 1200px"

    <div class="hero-overlay" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <div class="hero-text absolute" role="region" aria-labelledby="hero-title">
        <h1 id="hero-title" class="hero-title font-sans text-white/95 flex items-center font-extrabold">
            <span class="plus">+</span><span class="text-accent">30&nbsp;</span><span class="hero-main">años de maestría</span>

            <p>Más de 2000 clientes satisfechos</p>
            <p>Proyectos residenciales y comerciales en Bogotá y Colombia.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="hero-actions mt-6">
            <a href="#contacto" class="hero-cta inline-flex items-center gap-3" data-cta>
                Solicitar presupuesto
                <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 12h14M13 5l7 7-7 7" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
            </a>
    (function(){
        const section = document.getElementById('inicio');
        const title = section?.querySelector('.hero-title');
        const subtitles = section?.querySelector('.container-sub-title');
        const cta = section?.querySelector('[data-cta]');

        if (!section) return;

        const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
            entries.forEach(entry=>{
                if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                    title?.classList.add('show');
                    subtitles?.classList.add('show-subtitles');
                    cta?.classList.add('show-cta');
                    io.disconnect();
                }
            });
        }, { threshold: 0.2 });
        io.observe(section);
    })();
```
```

<section id="inicio" class="hero-container w-full relative flex justify-center items-center mt-[50px] bg-black" aria-label="Banner principal">
        alt="Detalle de soldadura representativo de Maestría del Hierro"
        width={1600}
        height={900}
        sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 1200px"

    <div class="hero-overlay" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <div class="hero-text absolute" role="region" aria-labelledby="hero-title">
        <h1 id="hero-title" class="hero-title font-sans text-white/95 flex items-center font-extrabold">
            <span class="plus">+</span><span class="text-accent">30&nbsp;</span><span class="hero-main">años de maestría</span>

            <p>Más de 2000 clientes satisfechos</p>
            <p>Proyectos residenciales y comerciales en Bogotá y Colombia.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="hero-actions mt-6">
            <a href="#contacto" class="hero-cta inline-flex items-center gap-3" data-cta>
                Solicitar presupuesto
                <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 12h14M13 5l7 7-7 7" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
            </a>
    (function(){
        const section = document.getElementById('inicio');
        const title = section?.querySelector('.hero-title');
        const subtitles = section?.querySelector('.container-sub-title');
        const cta = section?.querySelector('[data-cta]');

        if (!section) return;

        const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
            entries.forEach(entry=>{
                if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                    title?.classList.add('show');
                    subtitles?.classList.add('show-subtitles');
                    cta?.classList.add('show-cta');
                    io.disconnect();
                }
            });
        }, { threshold: 0.2 });
        io.observe(section);
    })();
```

**src/components/Hero/hero.css** (+47 líneas)**

```
    height: 720px;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    opacity: 0.85;
    transform: scale(1.03);
    transition: transform 12s linear;
}

.hero-overlay{
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(6,6,6,0.35) 10%, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 70%);
    mix-blend-mode: multiply;
    pointer-events: none;
    left: 8%;
    z-index: 5;
    max-width: 60%;
    text-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
    font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 6vw, 4.5rem);
    line-height: 1.02;
.plus { font-size: 0.6em; margin-right: .3em; }
.text-accent { color: var(--accent); }
.container-sub-title { margin-top: .6rem; font-size: clamp(.9rem, 2.5vw, 1.1rem); }
.hero-actions { margin-top: 1rem; }
.hero-cta{
    background: linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent) 0%, rgba(255,200,50,0.9) 100%);
    color: #111;
    padding: .75rem 1rem;
    border-radius: .5rem;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    transform: translateY(8px);
    transition: transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease, opacity .3s ease;
    opacity: .98;
.hero-cta:hover{ transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); }
.hero-cta.show-cta{ animation: pulse 1600ms infinite; }
/* Responsive */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero-container { height: 520px; }
    .hero-text { left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%,-50%); max-width: 92%; text-align: center; }
    .hero-title { font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 8vw, 2.4rem); }
/* Animations */
.hero-title{ transform: translateY(30px); opacity: 0; transition: transform 900ms cubic-bezier(.2,.9,.2,1), opacity 900ms ease; }
.container-sub-title{ transition: opacity 1200ms ease, transform 1200ms ease; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(6px); }
.hero-title.show{ transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; }
.show-subtitles{ opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

@keyframes pulse { 0%{ transform: scale(1); } 50%{ transform: scale(1.03); } 100%{ transform: scale(1); } }
.hero-image{ will-change: transform; }
```

**src/styles/global.css** (+19 líneas)**

```

:root{
  --accent: #d4a017; /* tono dorado/cobre */
  --muted: #6b6b6b;
  --bg: #0b0b0b;
  --text: #111827;
}

/* Small utility for reveal animation usable en componentes */
.reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); transition: transform .6s ease, opacity .6s ease; }
.reveal.show { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

@keyframes slideUp { from { opacity:0; transform: translateY(12px);} to { opacity:1; transform: translateY(0);} }

@keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity:0 } to { opacity:1 } }

/* Improve image rendering */
img, picture { image-rendering: optimizeQuality; }
```

```

                    title?.classList.add('show');
                    subtitles?.classList.add('show-subtitles');
                    cta?.classList.add('show-cta');
                    io.disconnect();
                }
            });
        }, { threshold: 0.2 });
        io.observe(section);
    })();
```

```
    height: 720px;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    opacity: 0.85;
    transform: scale(1.03);
    transition: transform 12s linear;
}

.hero-overlay{
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(6,6,6,0.35) 10%, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 70%);
    mix-blend-mode: multiply;
    pointer-events: none;
    left: 8%;
    z-index: 5;
    max-width: 60%;
    text-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
    font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 6vw, 4.5rem);
    line-height: 1.02;
.plus { font-size: 0.6em; margin-right: .3em; }
.text-accent { color: var(--accent); }
.container-sub-title { margin-top: .6rem; font-size: clamp(.9rem, 2.5vw, 1.1rem); }
.hero-actions { margin-top: 1rem; }
.hero-cta{
    background: linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent) 0%, rgba(255,200,50,0.9) 100%);
    color: #111;
    padding: .75rem 1rem;
    border-radius: .5rem;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    transform: translateY(8px);
    transition: transform .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease, opacity .3s ease;
    opacity: .98;
.hero-cta:hover{ transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); }
.hero-cta.show-cta{ animation: pulse 1600ms infinite; }
/* Responsive */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero-container { height: 520px; }
    .hero-text { left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%,-50%); max-width: 92%; text-align: center; }
    .hero-title { font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 8vw, 2.4rem); }
/* Animations */
.hero-title{ transform: translateY(30px); opacity: 0; transition: transform 900ms cubic-bezier(.2,.9,.2,1), opacity 900ms ease; }
.container-sub-title{ transition: opacity 1200ms ease, transform 1200ms ease; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(6px); }
.hero-title.show{ transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; }
.show-subtitles{ opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

@keyframes pulse { 0%{ transform: scale(1); } 50%{ transform: scale(1.03); } 100%{ transform: scale(1); } }
.hero-image{ will-change: transform; }
```

**src/styles/global.css** (+19 líneas)**

```

:root{
  --accent: #d4a017; /* tono dorado/cobre */
  --muted: #6b6b6b;
  --bg: #0b0b0b;
  --text: #111827;
}

/* Small utility for reveal animation usable en componentes */
.reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); transition: transform .6s ease, opacity .6s ease; }
.reveal.show { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

@keyframes slideUp { from { opacity:0; transform: translateY(12px);} to { opacity:1; transform: translateY(0);} }

@keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity:0 } to { opacity:1 } }

/* Improve image rendering */
img, picture { image-rendering: optimizeQuality; }
```


**src/components/Hero/Hero.astro** (+42 líneas)**

```

<section id="inicio" class="hero-container w-full relative flex justify-center items-center mt-[50px] bg-black" aria-label="Banner principal">
        alt="Detalle de soldadura representativo de Maestría del Hierro"
        width={1600}
        height={900}
        sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 1200px"

    <div class="hero-overlay" aria-hidden="true"></div>

    <div class="hero-text absolute" role="region" aria-labelledby="hero-title">
        <h1 id="hero-title" class="hero-title font-sans text-white/95 flex items-center font-extrabold">
            <span class="plus">+</span><span class="text-accent">30&nbsp;</span><span class="hero-main">años de maestría</span>

            <p>Más de 2000 clientes satisfechos</p>
            <p>Proyectos residenciales y comerciales en Bogotá y Colombia.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="hero-actions mt-6">
            <a href="#contacto" class="hero-cta inline-flex items-center gap-3" data-cta>
                Solicitar presupuesto
                <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 12h14M13 5l7 7-7 7" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
            </a>
    (function(){
        const section = document.getElementById('inicio');
        const title = section?.querySelector('.hero-title');
        const subtitles = section?.querySelector('.container-sub-title');
        const cta = section?.querySelector('[data-cta]');

        if (!section) return;

        const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
            entries.forEach(entry=>{
                if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                    title?.classList.add('show');
                    subtitles?.classList.add('show-subtitles');
                    cta?.classList.add('show-cta');
                    io.disconnect();
                }
            });
        }, { threshold: 0.2 });
        io.observe(section);
    })();
```

```
const imageFiles = [
  'b.webp',
  'baran.webp',
  'barandilla.webp',
  'barandillaDeSeguridad.webp',
  'barandillaLarga.webp',
  'cal.webp',
  'captura-de-pantalla-2026-05-15-115008.webp',
  'cortinaPanPa_Ya.webp',
  'cortinaPopsy.webp',
  'domo.webp',
  'escaleraAlta.webp',
  'escaleraDelgada.webp',
  'escaleraFlotante.webp',
  'escaleraGruesa.webp',
  'fondoAbout.webp',
  'gimnasio.webp',
  'hjbgjh.webp',
  'om.webp',
  'parqueInfantil.webp',
  'port.webp',
  'portonConjunto.webp',
  'portonGaraje.webp',
  'puerta.webp',
  'puertaCuadros.webp',
  'puertaNegra.webp',
  'puertaYVentanaDeAluminio.webp',
  're.webp',
  'rejaParaContadorGas.webp',
  'rejaParaContadorLuz.webp',
  'rejaPerimetral.webp',
  'soldador.webp',
  'techo.webp',
  'techoDePolicarbonato.webp',
  'techoLargoPolicarbonato.webp',
  'ton.webp',
  'ventanaBlanca.webp',
  'videoHero.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.09-p.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.09-pm.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.11-pm.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.12-pm.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.14-pm.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.15-.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.15-pm.webp',
];
function titleFromFilename(name) {
  return name
    .replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '')
    .replace(/[-_\.]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\b(\w)/g, s => s.toUpperCase());
}
---
<section id="portfolio" class="w-full bg-azulPetroleo flex flex-col items-center justify-center ">
  <ul class="w-[90%] containerPortfolio text-white">
    {imageFiles.map((file, i) => (
      <li class={`image-${i+1} border-[1px] border-borde relative overflow-hidden rounded-lg cursor-pointer`} key={file}>
        <Image class="w-full h-full target-image object-cover" src={`/assets/${file}`} width={640} height={480} loading="eager" alt={titleFromFilename(file)} />
        <div class="w-full inset-0 h-full container-info">
          <div class="inset-0 w-full h-3/6 p-2 bg-black/70 absolute tarjet flex flex-col">
            <h3 class="text-[12px] md:text-[16px] lg:text-[20px] font-bold">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
    ))}
  </ul>
```

```
  'puerta.webp',
  'puertaCuadros.webp',
  'puertaNegra.webp',
  'puertaYVentanaDeAluminio.webp',

  'rejaParaContadorGas.webp',
  'rejaParaContadorLuz.webp',
  'rejaPerimetral.webp',
  'techo.webp',
  'techoDePolicarbonato.webp',
  'techoLargoPolicarbonato.webp',
  'ton.webp',
  'ventanaBlanca.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.09-p.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.09-pm.webp',

];
function titleFromFilename(name) {
  return name
    .replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '')
    .replace(/[-_\.]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\b(\w)/g, s => s.toUpperCase());
}
---
<section id="portfolio" class="w-full bg-azulPetroleo flex flex-col items-center justify-center ">
  <ul class="w-[90%] containerPortfolio text-white">
    {imageFiles.map((file, i) => (
      <li class={`image-${i+1} border-[1px] border-borde relative overflow-hidden rounded-lg cursor-pointer`} key={file}>
        <Image class="w-full h-full target-image object-cover" src={`/assets/${file}`} width={640} height={480} loading="eager" alt={titleFromFilename(file)} />
        <div class="w-full inset-0 h-full container-info">
          <div class="inset-0 w-full h-3/6 p-2 bg-black/70 absolute tarjet flex flex-col">
            <h3 class="text-[12px] md:text-[16px] lg:text-[20px] font-bold">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
    ))}
  </ul>
```

```
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.11-pm.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.12-pm.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.14-pm.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.15-.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.15-pm.webp',
];
function titleFromFilename(name) {
  return name
    .replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '')
    .replace(/[-_\.]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\b(\w)/g, s => s.toUpperCase());
}
---
<section id="portfolio" class="w-full bg-azulPetroleo flex flex-col items-center justify-center ">
  <ul class="w-[90%] containerPortfolio text-white">
    {imageFiles.map((file, i) => (
      <li class={`image-${i+1} border-[1px] border-borde relative overflow-hidden rounded-lg cursor-pointer`} key={file}>
        <Image class="w-full h-full target-image object-cover" src={`/assets/${file}`} width={640} height={480} loading="eager" alt={titleFromFilename(file)} />
        <div class="w-full inset-0 h-full container-info">
          <div class="inset-0 w-full h-3/6 p-2 bg-black/70 absolute tarjet flex flex-col">
            <h3 class="text-[12px] md:text-[16px] lg:text-[20px] font-bold">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
    ))}
  </ul>
```

```
  'rejaPerimetral.webp',
  'techo.webp',
  'techoDePolicarbonato.webp',
  'techoLargoPolicarbonato.webp',
  'ton.webp',
  'ventanaBlanca.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.09-p.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.09-pm.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.11-pm.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.12-pm.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.14-pm.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.15-.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.15-pm.webp',
];
function titleFromFilename(name) {
  return name
    .replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '')
    .replace(/[-_\.]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\b(\w)/g, s => s.toUpperCase());
}
---
<section id="portfolio" class="w-full bg-azulPetroleo flex flex-col items-center justify-center ">
  <ul class="w-[90%] containerPortfolio text-white">
    {imageFiles.map((file, i) => (
      <li class={`image-${i+1} border-[1px] border-borde relative overflow-hidden rounded-lg cursor-pointer`} key={file}>
        <Image class="w-full h-full target-image object-cover" src={`/assets/${file}`} width={640} height={480} loading="eager" alt={titleFromFilename(file)} />
        <div class="w-full inset-0 h-full container-info">
          <div class="inset-0 w-full h-3/6 p-2 bg-black/70 absolute tarjet flex flex-col">
            <h3 class="text-[12px] md:text-[16px] lg:text-[20px] font-bold">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
    ))}
  </ul>
```

```
  'puerta.webp',
  'puertaCuadros.webp',
  'puertaNegra.webp',
  'puertaYVentanaDeAluminio.webp',
  're.webp',
  'rejaParaContadorGas.webp',
  'rejaParaContadorLuz.webp',
  'rejaPerimetral.webp',
  'techo.webp',
  'techoDePolicarbonato.webp',
  'techoLargoPolicarbonato.webp',
  'ton.webp',
  'ventanaBlanca.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.09-p.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.09-pm.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.11-pm.webp',

];
function titleFromFilename(name) {
  return name
    .replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '')
    .replace(/[-_\.]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\b(\w)/g, s => s.toUpperCase());
}
---
<section id="portfolio" class="w-full bg-azulPetroleo flex flex-col items-center justify-center ">
  <ul class="w-[90%] containerPortfolio text-white">
    {imageFiles.map((file, i) => (
      <li class={`image-${i+1} border-[1px] border-borde relative overflow-hidden rounded-lg cursor-pointer`} key={file}>
        <Image class="w-full h-full target-image object-cover" src={`/assets/${file}`} width={640} height={480} loading="eager" alt={titleFromFilename(file)} />
        <div class="w-full inset-0 h-full container-info">
          <div class="inset-0 w-full h-3/6 p-2 bg-black/70 absolute tarjet flex flex-col">
            <h3 class="text-[12px] md:text-[16px] lg:text-[20px] font-bold">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
    ))}
  </ul>
```

```
  'rejaPerimetral.webp',
  'techo.webp',
  'techoDePolicarbonato.webp',
  'techoLargoPolicarbonato.webp',
  'ton.webp',
  'ventanaBlanca.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.09-p.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.09-pm.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.11-pm.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.12-pm.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.14-pm.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.15-.webp',
  'whatsapp-image-2026-05-13-at-7.52.15-pm.webp',
];
function titleFromFilename(name) {
  return name
    .replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '')
    .replace(/[-_\.]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\b(\w)/g, s => s.toUpperCase());
}
---
<section id="portfolio" class="w-full bg-azulPetroleo flex flex-col items-center justify-center ">
  <ul class="w-[90%] containerPortfolio text-white">
    {imageFiles.map((file, i) => (
      <li class={`image-${i+1} border-[1px] border-borde relative overflow-hidden rounded-lg cursor-pointer`} key={file}>
        <Image class="w-full h-full target-image object-cover" src={`/assets/${file}`} width={640} height={480} loading="eager" alt={titleFromFilename(file)} />
        <div class="w-full inset-0 h-full container-info">
          <div class="inset-0 w-full h-3/6 p-2 bg-black/70 absolute tarjet flex flex-col">
            <h3 class="text-[12px] md:text-[16px] lg:text-[20px] font-bold">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
    ))}
  </ul>
```

```
    {imageFiles.map((file, i) => (
      <li class={`image-${i+1} border-[1px] border-borde relative overflow-hidden rounded-lg cursor-pointer`} key={file}>
        <Image class="w-full h-full target-image object-cover" src={`/assets/${file}`} width={640} height={480} loading="eager" alt={titleFromFilename(file)} />
        <div class="w-full inset-0 h-full container-info">
          <div class="inset-0 w-full h-3/6 p-2 bg-black/70 absolute tarjet flex flex-col">
            <h3 class="text-[12px] md:text-[16px] lg:text-[20px] font-bold">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
    ))}
  </ul>
```

```
import fs from 'fs'
import path from 'path'
import { fileURLToPath } from 'url'

// Resolve public/assets directory at build time and list existing image files
const assetsDir = path.resolve(fileURLToPath(new URL('../../../../public/assets', import.meta.url)));
let imageFiles = [];
if (fs.existsSync(assetsDir)) {
  imageFiles = fs.readdirSync(assetsDir).filter(f => /\.(webp|png|jpe?g|avif)$/i.test(f)).sort();
}

function titleFromFilename(name) {
  return name
    .replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '')
    .replace(/[-_\.]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\b(\w)/g, s => s.toUpperCase());
}

  <ul class="w-[90%] containerPortfolio text-white">
    {imageFiles.map((file, i) => (
      <li class={`image-${i+1} border-[1px] border-borde relative overflow-hidden rounded-lg cursor-pointer`} key={file}>
        <Image class="w-full h-full target-image object-cover" src={`/assets/${file}`} width={640} height={480} loading="eager" alt={titleFromFilename(file)} />
        <div class="w-full inset-0 h-full container-info">
          <div class="inset-0 w-full h-3/6 p-2 bg-black/70 absolute tarjet flex flex-col">
            <h3 class="text-[12px] md:text-[16px] lg:text-[20px] font-bold">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
    ))}
  </ul>
```

```
let imageFiles = [];
try {
  const fsMod: any = await import('node:fs');
  const pathMod: any = await import('node:path');
  const urlMod: any = await import('node:url');
  const assetsDir = pathMod.resolve(urlMod.fileURLToPath(new URL('../../../../public/assets', import.meta.url)));
  if (fsMod.existsSync(assetsDir)) {
    imageFiles = fsMod.readdirSync(assetsDir).filter((f: string) => /\.(webp|png|jpe?g|avif)$/i.test(f)).sort();
  }
} catch (e) {
  // If running in an environment without Node FS (editor type-checker or client), keep static fallback empty
}

function titleFromFilename(name) {
  return name
    .replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '')
    .replace(/[-_\.]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\b(\w)/g, s => s.toUpperCase());
}
---
<section id="portfolio" class="w-full bg-azulPetroleo flex flex-col items-center justify-center ">
  <ul class="w-[90%] containerPortfolio text-white">
    {imageFiles.map((file, i) => (
      <li class={`image-${i+1} border-[1px] border-borde relative overflow-hidden rounded-lg cursor-pointer`} key={file}>
        <Image class="w-full h-full target-image object-cover" src={`/assets/${file}`} width={640} height={480} loading="eager" alt={titleFromFilename(file)} />
        <div class="w-full inset-0 h-full container-info">
          <div class="inset-0 w-full h-3/6 p-2 bg-black/70 absolute tarjet flex flex-col">
            <h3 class="text-[12px] md:text-[16px] lg:text-[20px] font-bold">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
    ))}
  </ul>
```

```
// Use Vite/ Astro glob to load public asset URLs at build time without Node APIs
const modules = import.meta.glob('/assets/*.{webp,png,jpg,jpeg,avif}', { as: 'url', eager: true });
let imageFiles = Object.values(modules).map((url) => {
  const parts = String(url).split('/');
  return parts[parts.length - 1];
}).filter(Boolean).sort();
function titleFromFilename(name) {
  return name
    .replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '')
    .replace(/[-_\.]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\b(\w)/g, s => s.toUpperCase());
}
---
<section id="portfolio" class="w-full bg-azulPetroleo flex flex-col items-center justify-center ">
  <ul class="w-[90%] containerPortfolio text-white">
    {imageFiles.map((file, i) => (
      <li class={`image-${i+1} border-[1px] border-borde relative overflow-hidden rounded-lg cursor-pointer`} key={file}>
        <Image class="w-full h-full target-image object-cover" src={`/assets/${file}`} width={640} height={480} loading="eager" alt={titleFromFilename(file)} />
        <div class="w-full inset-0 h-full container-info">
          <div class="inset-0 w-full h-3/6 p-2 bg-black/70 absolute tarjet flex flex-col">
            <h3 class="text-[12px] md:text-[16px] lg:text-[20px] font-bold">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
    ))}
  </ul>
```

```
// Static list of images from public/assets (manual) while dynamic loading is resolved
const imageFiles = [
  'baranda balcon.webp',
  'baranda de seguirdad interna.webp',
  'baranda de seguridad.webp',
  'barandilla de seguridad interna.webp',
  'barandilla Larga.webp',

  'domo cubierta peatonal.webp',
  'domo grande policarbonato.webp',
  'domo paso peatonal.webp',
  'domo.webp',
  'escalera.webp',
  'escaleraAlta.webp',
  'escaleraDelgada.webp',
  'escaleraFlotante.webp',
  'escaleraGruesa.webp',
  'fondoAbout.webp',
  'gimnasio.webp',
  'logo.ico',
  'logo.png',
  'logo.WEBP',
  'logoWhatsapp.svg',
  'parqueInfantil.webp',
  'porton parte externa.webp',
  'porton.webp',
  'portonConjunto.webp',
  'portonGaraje.webp',
  'puerta.webp',
  'puertaCuadros.webp',
  'puertaNegra.webp',

].sort();
function titleFromFilename(name) {
  return name
    .replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '')
    .replace(/[-_\.]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\b(\w)/g, s => s.toUpperCase());
}
---
<section id="portfolio" class="w-full bg-azulPetroleo flex flex-col items-center justify-center ">
  <ul class="w-[90%] containerPortfolio text-white">
    {imageFiles.map((file, i) => (
      <li class={`image-${i+1} border-[1px] border-borde relative overflow-hidden rounded-lg cursor-pointer`} key={file}>
        <Image class="w-full h-full target-image object-cover" src={`/assets/${file}`} width={640} height={480} loading="eager" alt={titleFromFilename(file)} />
        <div class="w-full inset-0 h-full container-info">
          <div class="inset-0 w-full h-3/6 p-2 bg-black/70 absolute tarjet flex flex-col">
            <h3 class="text-[12px] md:text-[16px] lg:text-[20px] font-bold">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
    ))}
  </ul>
```
```

const imageFiles = [
  'baranda balcon.webp',
  'baranda de seguirdad interna.webp',
  'baranda de seguridad.webp',
  'barandilla de seguridad interna.webp',
  'barandilla Larga.webp',
  'barandilla.webp',
  'barandillaDeSeguridad.webp',
  'cortinaPanPa_Ya.webp',
  'cortinaPopsy.webp',
  'cubierta peatonal.webp',
  'domo cubierta peatonal.webp',
  'domo grande policarbonato.webp',
  'domo paso peatonal.webp',
  'domo.webp',
  'escalera.webp',
  'escaleraAlta.webp',
  'escaleraDelgada.webp',
  'escaleraFlotante.webp',
  'escaleraGruesa.webp',
  'fondoAbout.webp',
  'gimnasio.webp',
  'parqueInfantil.webp',
  'porton parte externa.webp',
  'porton.webp',
  'portonConjunto.webp',
  'portonGaraje.webp',
  'puerta.webp',
  'puertaCuadros.webp',
  'puertaNegra.webp',
  'puertas edificio 2.webp',
  'puertaYVentanaDeAluminio.webp',
  'reja de seguirdad.webp',
  'reja de seguridad externa.webp',
  'reja electrica.webp',
  'rejaParaContadorGas.webp',
  'rejaParaContadorLuz.webp',
  'rejaPerimetral.webp',
  'techo.webp',
  'techoDePolicarbonato.webp',
  'techoLargoPolicarbonato.webp',
  'ventanaBlanca.webp',
].sort();

// Categorías para agrupar los productos
const categories = {
  'Barandas & Barandillas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('baranda') || f.toLowerCase().includes('barandilla')),
  'Cortinas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('cortina')),
  'Cubiertas & Domos': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('cubierta') || f.toLowerCase().includes('domo') || f.toLowerCase().includes('techo')),
  'Escaleras': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('escalera')),
  'Portones & Puertas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('porton') || f.toLowerCase().includes('puerta')),
  'Rejas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('reja')),
  'Otros': imageFiles.filter(f =>
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('baranda') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('barandilla') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('cortina') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('cubierta') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('domo') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('techo') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('escalera') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('porton') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('puerta') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('reja')
  ),
};

function titleFromFilename(name: string) {
  return name
    .replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '')
    .replace(/[-_\.]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\b(\w)/g, (s: string) => s.toUpperCase());
}
<section id="portfolio" class="portfolio-section">
  <!-- Header decorativo -->
  <div class="portfolio-header">
    <div class="header-eyebrow">
      <span class="eyebrow-line"></span>
      <span class="eyebrow-text">Nuestro Trabajo</span>
      <span class="eyebrow-line"></span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="portfolio-title">Portafolio</h2>
    <p class="portfolio-subtitle">Soluciones en metal, aluminio y policarbonato con estándares de calidad superiores</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Filtros de categoría -->
  <div class="filter-bar">
    <button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all">Todos</button>
    {Object.keys(categories).map(cat => (
      <button class="filter-btn" data-filter={cat}>{cat}</button>
    ))}
  </div>

  <!-- Galería principal -->
  <div class="gallery-grid" id="gallery">
    {imageFiles.map((file, i) => {
      const category = Object.entries(categories).find(([_, files]) => files.includes(file))?.[0] ?? 'Otros';
      return (
        <article class="gallery-card" data-category={category} data-index={i}>
          <div class="card-image-wrap">
            <Image
              class="card-image"
              src={`/assets/${file}`}
              width={640}
              height={480}
              loading={i < 12 ? "eager" : "lazy"}
              alt={titleFromFilename(file)}
            />
            <div class="card-overlay">
              <div class="overlay-content">
                <span class="overlay-category">{category}</span>
                <h3 class="overlay-title">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
                <button class="overlay-cta" data-src={`/assets/${file}`} data-title={titleFromFilename(file)}>
                  <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                    <path d="M15 3h6v6M9 21H3v-6M21 3l-7 7M3 21l7-7"/>
                  </svg>
                  Ver detalle
                </button>
              </div>
          </div>
          <div class="card-footer">
            <span class="card-number">{String(i + 1).padStart(2, '0')}</span>
            <h3 class="card-title">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
            <span class="card-tag">{category}</span>
          </div>
        </article>
      );
    })}
  </div>

  <!-- Contador de resultados -->
  <div class="results-count">
    <span id="visible-count">{imageFiles.length}</span> productos mostrados
  </div>

<!-- Lightbox -->
<div class="lightbox" id="lightbox" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Vista ampliada">
  <button class="lightbox-close" id="lightbox-close" aria-label="Cerrar">
    <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
      <line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/>
    </svg>
  </button>
  <div class="lightbox-inner">
    <img class="lightbox-img" id="lightbox-img" src="" alt="" />
    <div class="lightbox-info">
      <p class="lightbox-title" id="lightbox-title"></p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
  /* ─── TOKENS ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  :root {
    --c-bg:       #0a0f1a;
    --c-surface:  #111827;
    --c-border:   rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    --c-accent:   #e8a020;
    --c-accent2:  #f0c040;
    --c-text:     #f0f4ff;
    --c-muted:    #6b7280;
    --c-card-bg:  #141b2d;
    --radius:     12px;
    --transition: 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
  }

  /* ─── SECTION ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .portfolio-section {
    width: 100%;
    min-height: 100vh;
    background: var(--c-bg);
    padding: 80px 24px 100px;
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* fondo con patrón de rejilla sutil */
  .portfolio-section::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.025) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.025) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 40px 40px;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
  }

  /* ─── HEADER ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .portfolio-header {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 56px;
  }

  .header-eyebrow {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .eyebrow-line {
    display: block;
    width: 48px;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--c-accent));
  }

  .eyebrow-line:last-child {
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--c-accent), transparent);
  }

  .eyebrow-text {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--c-accent);
  }

  .portfolio-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 5rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--c-text);
    line-height: 1;
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    margin: 0 0 16px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff 40%, var(--c-accent2));
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
  }

  .portfolio-subtitle {
    font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 2vw, 1.1rem);
    color: var(--c-muted);
    max-width: 540px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  /* ─── FILTROS ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .filter-bar {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 10px;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-bottom: 48px;
  }

  .filter-btn {
    padding: 8px 20px;
    border-radius: 100px;
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    background: var(--c-surface);
    color: var(--c-muted);
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: var(--transition);
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }

  .filter-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
    color: var(--c-text);
  }

  .filter-btn.active {
    background: var(--c-accent);
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
    color: #000;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  /* ─── GRID ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .gallery-grid {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 20px;
    max-width: 1440px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  /* ─── CARD ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .gallery-card {
    background: var(--c-card-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform var(--transition), box-shadow var(--transition), border-color var(--transition);
    will-change: transform;
    animation: cardReveal 0.5s ease both;
  }

  .gallery-card:nth-child(1)  { animation-delay: 0.02s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(2)  { animation-delay: 0.04s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(3)  { animation-delay: 0.06s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(4)  { animation-delay: 0.08s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(5)  { animation-delay: 0.10s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(6)  { animation-delay: 0.12s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(7)  { animation-delay: 0.14s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(8)  { animation-delay: 0.16s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(n+9) { animation-delay: 0.18s }

  @keyframes cardReveal {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px) scale(0.97); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
  }

  .gallery-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px) scale(1.01);
    box-shadow: 0 24px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 0 1px var(--c-accent);
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
  }

  .gallery-card.hidden {
    display: none;
  }

  /* ─── IMAGEN ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-image-wrap {
    position: relative;
    aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .card-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
    transition: transform 0.6s ease;
  }

  .gallery-card:hover .card-image {
    transform: scale(1.07);
  }

  /* ─── OVERLAY ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.85) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 50%, transparent 100%);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity var(--transition);
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-end;
  }

  .gallery-card:hover .card-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  .overlay-content {
    padding: 20px;
    transform: translateY(10px);
    transition: transform var(--transition);
    width: 100%;
  }

  .gallery-card:hover .overlay-content {
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  .overlay-category {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--c-accent);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }

  .overlay-title {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #fff;
    margin: 0 0 14px;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }

  .overlay-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    padding: 8px 16px;
    background: var(--c-accent);
    color: #000;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }

  .overlay-cta:hover {
    background: var(--c-accent2);
  }

  /* ─── CARD FOOTER ─────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-footer {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  }

  .card-number {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--c-accent);
    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
    opacity: 0.7;
  }

  .card-title {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-text);
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .card-tag {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-muted);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }

  /* ─── CONTADOR ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .results-count {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 40px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--c-muted);
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }

  .results-count span {
    color: var(--c-accent);
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 15px;
  }

  /* ─── LIGHTBOX ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .lightbox {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 9999;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 24px;
  }

  .lightbox.open {
    display: flex;
    animation: fadeIn 0.25s ease;
  }

  @keyframes fadeIn {
    from { opacity: 0 }
    to   { opacity: 1 }
  }

  .lightbox-close {
    position: fixed;
    top: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    width: 44px;
    height: 44px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    color: #fff;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: background 0.2s;
    z-index: 10000;
  }

  .lightbox-close:hover {
    background: var(--c-accent);
    color: #000;
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
  }

  .lightbox-inner {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
    max-width: 90vw;
    max-height: 90vh;
    animation: popIn 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) both;
  }

  @keyframes popIn {
    from { transform: scale(0.88); opacity: 0; }
    to   { transform: scale(1);    opacity: 1; }
  }

  .lightbox-img {
    max-width: 100%;
    max-height: 80vh;
    object-fit: contain;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    box-shadow: 0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
  }

  .lightbox-title {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-text);
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    margin: 0;
  }

  /* ─── RESPONSIVE ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  @media (max-width: 640px) {
    .portfolio-section { padding: 48px 16px 64px; }
    .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; }
    .card-footer { padding: 10px 12px; }
    .filter-bar { gap: 8px; }
    .filter-btn { font-size: 11px; padding: 6px 14px; }
    .card-tag { display: none; }
  }
</style>

<script>
  const filterBtns = document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>('.filter-btn');
  const cards      = document.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>('.gallery-card');
  const countEl    = document.getElementById('visible-count');
  const lightbox   = document.getElementById('lightbox')!;
  const lbImg      = document.getElementById('lightbox-img') as HTMLImageElement;
  const lbTitle    = document.getElementById('lightbox-title')!;
  const lbClose    = document.getElementById('lightbox-close')!;

  // ── FILTROS ──
  filterBtns.forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      filterBtns.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
      btn.classList.add('active');
      const filter = btn.dataset.filter ?? 'all';
      let visible = 0;
      cards.forEach(card => {
        const show = filter === 'all' || card.dataset.category === filter;
        card.classList.toggle('hidden', !show);
        if (show) visible++;
      });
      if (countEl) countEl.textContent = String(visible);
    });
  });

  // ── LIGHTBOX ──
  document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>('.overlay-cta').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      e.stopPropagation();
      const src   = btn.dataset.src ?? '';
      const title = btn.dataset.title ?? '';
      lbImg.src        = src;
      lbImg.alt        = title;
      lbTitle.textContent = title;
      lightbox.classList.add('open');
      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    });
  });

  // También al hacer clic en la card completa
  cards.forEach(card => {
    card.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const btn = card.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>('.overlay-cta');
      if (btn) btn.click();
    });
  });

  function closeLightbox() {
    lightbox.classList.remove('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }

  lbClose.addEventListener('click', closeLightbox);
  lightbox.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    if (e.target === lightbox) closeLightbox();
  });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') closeLightbox();
  });
</script>
```

```
const imageFiles = [
  'baranda balcon.webp',
  'baranda de seguirdad interna.webp',
  'baranda de seguridad.webp',
  'barandilla de seguridad interna.webp',
  'barandilla Larga.webp',
  'barandilla.webp',
  'barandillaDeSeguridad.webp',
  'cortinaPanPa_Ya.webp',
  'cortinaPopsy.webp',
  'cubierta peatonal.webp',
  'domo cubierta peatonal.webp',
  'domo grande policarbonato.webp',
  'domo paso peatonal.webp',
  'domo.webp',
  'escalera.webp',
  'escaleraAlta.webp',
  'escaleraDelgada.webp',
  'escaleraFlotante.webp',
  'escaleraGruesa.webp',
  'gimnasio.webp',
  'parqueInfantil.webp',
  'porton parte externa.webp',
  'porton.webp',
  'portonConjunto.webp',
  'portonGaraje.webp',
  'puerta.webp',
  'puertaCuadros.webp',
  'puertaNegra.webp',
  'puertas edificio 2.webp',
  'puertaYVentanaDeAluminio.webp',
  'reja de seguirdad.webp',
  'reja de seguridad externa.webp',
  'reja electrica.webp',
  'rejaParaContadorGas.webp',
  'rejaParaContadorLuz.webp',
  'rejaPerimetral.webp',
  'techo.webp',
  'techoDePolicarbonato.webp',
  'techoLargoPolicarbonato.webp',
  'ventanaBlanca.webp',
].sort();

// Categorías para agrupar los productos
const categories = {
  'Barandas & Barandillas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('baranda') || f.toLowerCase().includes('barandilla')),
  'Cortinas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('cortina')),
  'Cubiertas & Domos': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('cubierta') || f.toLowerCase().includes('domo') || f.toLowerCase().includes('techo')),
  'Escaleras': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('escalera')),
  'Portones & Puertas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('porton') || f.toLowerCase().includes('puerta')),
  'Rejas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('reja')),
  'Otros': imageFiles.filter(f =>
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('baranda') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('barandilla') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('cortina') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('cubierta') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('domo') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('techo') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('escalera') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('porton') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('puerta') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('reja')
  ),
};

function titleFromFilename(name: string) {
  return name
    .replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '')
    .replace(/[-_\.]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\b(\w)/g, (s: string) => s.toUpperCase());
}
<section id="portfolio" class="portfolio-section">
  <!-- Header decorativo -->
  <div class="portfolio-header">
    <div class="header-eyebrow">
      <span class="eyebrow-line"></span>
      <span class="eyebrow-text">Nuestro Trabajo</span>
      <span class="eyebrow-line"></span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="portfolio-title">Portafolio</h2>
    <p class="portfolio-subtitle">Soluciones en metal, aluminio y policarbonato con estándares de calidad superiores</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Filtros de categoría -->
  <div class="filter-bar">
    <button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all">Todos</button>
    {Object.keys(categories).map(cat => (
      <button class="filter-btn" data-filter={cat}>{cat}</button>
    ))}
  </div>

  <!-- Galería principal -->
  <div class="gallery-grid" id="gallery">
    {imageFiles.map((file, i) => {
      const category = Object.entries(categories).find(([_, files]) => files.includes(file))?.[0] ?? 'Otros';
      return (
        <article class="gallery-card" data-category={category} data-index={i}>
          <div class="card-image-wrap">
            <Image
              class="card-image"
              src={`/assets/${file}`}
              width={640}
              height={480}
              loading={i < 12 ? "eager" : "lazy"}
              alt={titleFromFilename(file)}
            />
            <div class="card-overlay">
              <div class="overlay-content">
                <span class="overlay-category">{category}</span>
                <h3 class="overlay-title">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
                <button class="overlay-cta" data-src={`/assets/${file}`} data-title={titleFromFilename(file)}>
                  <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                    <path d="M15 3h6v6M9 21H3v-6M21 3l-7 7M3 21l7-7"/>
                  </svg>
                  Ver detalle
                </button>
              </div>
          </div>
          <div class="card-footer">
            <span class="card-number">{String(i + 1).padStart(2, '0')}</span>
            <h3 class="card-title">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
            <span class="card-tag">{category}</span>
          </div>
        </article>
      );
    })}
  </div>

  <!-- Contador de resultados -->
  <div class="results-count">
    <span id="visible-count">{imageFiles.length}</span> productos mostrados
  </div>

<!-- Lightbox -->
<div class="lightbox" id="lightbox" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Vista ampliada">
  <button class="lightbox-close" id="lightbox-close" aria-label="Cerrar">
    <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
      <line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/>
    </svg>
  </button>
  <div class="lightbox-inner">
    <img class="lightbox-img" id="lightbox-img" src="" alt="" />
    <div class="lightbox-info">
      <p class="lightbox-title" id="lightbox-title"></p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
  /* ─── TOKENS ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  :root {
    --c-bg:       #0a0f1a;
    --c-surface:  #111827;
    --c-border:   rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    --c-accent:   #e8a020;
    --c-accent2:  #f0c040;
    --c-text:     #f0f4ff;
    --c-muted:    #6b7280;
    --c-card-bg:  #141b2d;
    --radius:     12px;
    --transition: 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
  }

  /* ─── SECTION ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .portfolio-section {
    width: 100%;
    min-height: 100vh;
    background: var(--c-bg);
    padding: 80px 24px 100px;
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* fondo con patrón de rejilla sutil */
  .portfolio-section::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.025) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.025) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 40px 40px;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
  }

  /* ─── HEADER ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .portfolio-header {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 56px;
  }

  .header-eyebrow {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .eyebrow-line {
    display: block;
    width: 48px;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--c-accent));
  }

  .eyebrow-line:last-child {
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--c-accent), transparent);
  }

  .eyebrow-text {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--c-accent);
  }

  .portfolio-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 5rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--c-text);
    line-height: 1;
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    margin: 0 0 16px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff 40%, var(--c-accent2));
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
  }

  .portfolio-subtitle {
    font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 2vw, 1.1rem);
    color: var(--c-muted);
    max-width: 540px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  /* ─── FILTROS ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .filter-bar {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 10px;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-bottom: 48px;
  }

  .filter-btn {
    padding: 8px 20px;
    border-radius: 100px;
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    background: var(--c-surface);
    color: var(--c-muted);
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: var(--transition);
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }

  .filter-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
    color: var(--c-text);
  }

  .filter-btn.active {
    background: var(--c-accent);
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
    color: #000;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  /* ─── GRID ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .gallery-grid {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 20px;
    max-width: 1440px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  /* ─── CARD ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .gallery-card {
    background: var(--c-card-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform var(--transition), box-shadow var(--transition), border-color var(--transition);
    will-change: transform;
    animation: cardReveal 0.5s ease both;
  }

  .gallery-card:nth-child(1)  { animation-delay: 0.02s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(2)  { animation-delay: 0.04s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(3)  { animation-delay: 0.06s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(4)  { animation-delay: 0.08s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(5)  { animation-delay: 0.10s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(6)  { animation-delay: 0.12s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(7)  { animation-delay: 0.14s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(8)  { animation-delay: 0.16s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(n+9) { animation-delay: 0.18s }

  @keyframes cardReveal {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px) scale(0.97); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
  }

  .gallery-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px) scale(1.01);
    box-shadow: 0 24px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 0 1px var(--c-accent);
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
  }

  .gallery-card.hidden {
    display: none;
  }

  /* ─── IMAGEN ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-image-wrap {
    position: relative;
    aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .card-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
    transition: transform 0.6s ease;
  }

  .gallery-card:hover .card-image {
    transform: scale(1.07);
  }

  /* ─── OVERLAY ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.85) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 50%, transparent 100%);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity var(--transition);
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-end;
  }

  .gallery-card:hover .card-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  .overlay-content {
    padding: 20px;
    transform: translateY(10px);
    transition: transform var(--transition);
    width: 100%;
  }

  .gallery-card:hover .overlay-content {
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  .overlay-category {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--c-accent);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }

  .overlay-title {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #fff;
    margin: 0 0 14px;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }

  .overlay-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    padding: 8px 16px;
    background: var(--c-accent);
    color: #000;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }

  .overlay-cta:hover {
    background: var(--c-accent2);
  }

  /* ─── CARD FOOTER ─────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-footer {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  }

  .card-number {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--c-accent);
    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
    opacity: 0.7;
  }

  .card-title {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-text);
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .card-tag {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-muted);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }

  /* ─── CONTADOR ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .results-count {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 40px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--c-muted);
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }

  .results-count span {
    color: var(--c-accent);
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 15px;
  }

  /* ─── LIGHTBOX ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .lightbox {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 9999;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 24px;
  }

  .lightbox.open {
    display: flex;
    animation: fadeIn 0.25s ease;
  }

  @keyframes fadeIn {
    from { opacity: 0 }
    to   { opacity: 1 }
  }

  .lightbox-close {
    position: fixed;
    top: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    width: 44px;
    height: 44px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    color: #fff;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: background 0.2s;
    z-index: 10000;
  }

  .lightbox-close:hover {
    background: var(--c-accent);
    color: #000;
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
  }

  .lightbox-inner {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
    max-width: 90vw;
    max-height: 90vh;
    animation: popIn 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) both;
  }

  @keyframes popIn {
    from { transform: scale(0.88); opacity: 0; }
    to   { transform: scale(1);    opacity: 1; }
  }

  .lightbox-img {
    max-width: 100%;
    max-height: 80vh;
    object-fit: contain;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    box-shadow: 0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
  }

  .lightbox-title {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-text);
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    margin: 0;
  }

  /* ─── RESPONSIVE ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  @media (max-width: 640px) {
    .portfolio-section { padding: 48px 16px 64px; }
    .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; }
    .card-footer { padding: 10px 12px; }
    .filter-bar { gap: 8px; }
    .filter-btn { font-size: 11px; padding: 6px 14px; }
    .card-tag { display: none; }
  }
</style>

<script>
  const filterBtns = document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>('.filter-btn');
  const cards      = document.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>('.gallery-card');
  const countEl    = document.getElementById('visible-count');
  const lightbox   = document.getElementById('lightbox')!;
  const lbImg      = document.getElementById('lightbox-img') as HTMLImageElement;
  const lbTitle    = document.getElementById('lightbox-title')!;
  const lbClose    = document.getElementById('lightbox-close')!;

  // ── FILTROS ──
  filterBtns.forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      filterBtns.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
      btn.classList.add('active');
      const filter = btn.dataset.filter ?? 'all';
      let visible = 0;
      cards.forEach(card => {
        const show = filter === 'all' || card.dataset.category === filter;
        card.classList.toggle('hidden', !show);
        if (show) visible++;
      });
      if (countEl) countEl.textContent = String(visible);
    });
  });

  // ── LIGHTBOX ──
  document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>('.overlay-cta').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      e.stopPropagation();
      const src   = btn.dataset.src ?? '';
      const title = btn.dataset.title ?? '';
      lbImg.src        = src;
      lbImg.alt        = title;
      lbTitle.textContent = title;
      lightbox.classList.add('open');
      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    });
  });

  // También al hacer clic en la card completa
  cards.forEach(card => {
    card.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const btn = card.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>('.overlay-cta');
      if (btn) btn.click();
    });
  });

  function closeLightbox() {
    lightbox.classList.remove('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }

  lbClose.addEventListener('click', closeLightbox);
  lightbox.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    if (e.target === lightbox) closeLightbox();
  });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') closeLightbox();
  });
</script>
```

```
const imageFiles = [
  'baranda balcon.webp',
  'baranda de seguirdad interna.webp',
  'baranda de seguridad.webp',
  'barandilla de seguridad interna.webp',
  'barandilla Larga.webp',
  'barandilla.webp',
  'barandillaDeSeguridad.webp',
  'cortinaPanPa_Ya.webp',
  'cortinaPopsy.webp',
  'cubierta peatonal.webp',
  'domo cubierta peatonal.webp',
  'domo grande policarbonato.webp',
  'domo paso peatonal.webp',
  'domo.webp',
  'escalera.webp',
  'escaleraAlta.webp',
  'escaleraDelgada.webp',
  'escaleraFlotante.webp',
  'escaleraGruesa.webp',
  'gimnasio.webp',
  'parqueInfantil.webp',
  'porton parte externa.webp',
  'porton.webp',
  'portonConjunto.webp',
  'portonGaraje.webp',
  'puerta.webp',
  'puertaCuadros.webp',
  'puertaNegra.webp',
  'puertas edificio 2.webp',
  'puertaYVentanaDeAluminio.webp',
  'reja de seguirdad.webp',
  'reja de seguridad externa.webp',
  'reja electrica.webp',
  'rejaParaContadorGas.webp',
  'rejaParaContadorLuz.webp',
  'rejaPerimetral.webp',
  'techo.webp',
  'techoDePolicarbonato.webp',
  'techoLargoPolicarbonato.webp',
  'ventanaBlanca.webp',
].sort();

// Categorías para agrupar los productos
const categories = {
  'Barandas & Barandillas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('baranda') || f.toLowerCase().includes('barandilla')),
  'Cortinas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('cortina')),
  'Cubiertas & Domos': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('cubierta') || f.toLowerCase().includes('domo') || f.toLowerCase().includes('techo')),
  'Escaleras': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('escalera')),
  'Portones & Puertas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('porton') || f.toLowerCase().includes('puerta')),
  'Rejas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('reja')),
  'Ventanas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('ventana')),
  'Otros': imageFiles.filter(f =>
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('baranda') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('barandilla') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('cortina') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('cubierta') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('domo') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('techo') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('escalera') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('porton') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('puerta') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('reja') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('ventana')
  ),
};

function titleFromFilename(name: string) {
  return name
    .replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '')
    .replace(/[-_\.]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\b(\w)/g, (s: string) => s.toUpperCase());
}
<section id="portfolio" class="portfolio-section">
  <!-- Header decorativo -->
  <div class="portfolio-header">
    <div class="header-eyebrow">
      <span class="eyebrow-line"></span>
      <span class="eyebrow-text">Nuestro Trabajo</span>
      <span class="eyebrow-line"></span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="portfolio-title">Portafolio</h2>
    <p class="portfolio-subtitle">Soluciones en metal, aluminio y policarbonato con estándares de calidad superiores</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Filtros de categoría -->
  <div class="filter-bar">
    <button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all">Todos</button>
    {Object.keys(categories).map(cat => (
      <button class="filter-btn" data-filter={cat}>{cat}</button>
    ))}
  </div>

  <!-- Galería principal -->
  <div class="gallery-grid" id="gallery">
    {imageFiles.map((file, i) => {
      const category = Object.entries(categories).find(([_, files]) => files.includes(file))?.[0] ?? 'Otros';
      return (
        <article class="gallery-card" data-category={category} data-index={i}>
          <div class="card-image-wrap">
            <Image
              class="card-image"
              src={`/assets/${file}`}
              width={640}
              height={480}
              loading={i < 12 ? "eager" : "lazy"}
              alt={titleFromFilename(file)}
            />
            <div class="card-overlay">
              <div class="overlay-content">
                <span class="overlay-category">{category}</span>
                <h3 class="overlay-title">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
                <button class="overlay-cta" data-src={`/assets/${file}`} data-title={titleFromFilename(file)}>
                  <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                    <path d="M15 3h6v6M9 21H3v-6M21 3l-7 7M3 21l7-7"/>
                  </svg>
                  Ver detalle
                </button>
              </div>
          </div>
          <div class="card-footer">
            <span class="card-number">{String(i + 1).padStart(2, '0')}</span>
            <h3 class="card-title">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
            <span class="card-tag">{category}</span>
          </div>
        </article>
      );
    })}
  </div>

  <!-- Contador de resultados -->
  <div class="results-count">
    <span id="visible-count">{imageFiles.length}</span> productos mostrados
  </div>

<!-- Lightbox -->
<div class="lightbox" id="lightbox" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Vista ampliada">
  <button class="lightbox-close" id="lightbox-close" aria-label="Cerrar">
    <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
      <line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/>
    </svg>
  </button>
  <div class="lightbox-inner">
    <img class="lightbox-img" id="lightbox-img" src="" alt="" />
    <div class="lightbox-info">
      <p class="lightbox-title" id="lightbox-title"></p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
  /* ─── TOKENS ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  :root {
    --c-bg:       #0a0f1a;
    --c-surface:  #111827;
    --c-border:   rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    --c-accent:   #e8a020;
    --c-accent2:  #f0c040;
    --c-text:     #f0f4ff;
    --c-muted:    #6b7280;
    --c-card-bg:  #141b2d;
    --radius:     12px;
    --transition: 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
  }

  /* ─── SECTION ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .portfolio-section {
    width: 100%;
    min-height: 100vh;
    background: var(--c-bg);
    padding: 80px 24px 100px;
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* fondo con patrón de rejilla sutil */
  .portfolio-section::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.025) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.025) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 40px 40px;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
  }

  /* ─── HEADER ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .portfolio-header {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 56px;
  }

  .header-eyebrow {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .eyebrow-line {
    display: block;
    width: 48px;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--c-accent));
  }

  .eyebrow-line:last-child {
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--c-accent), transparent);
  }

  .eyebrow-text {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--c-accent);
  }

  .portfolio-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 5rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--c-text);
    line-height: 1;
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    margin: 0 0 16px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff 40%, var(--c-accent2));
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
  }

  .portfolio-subtitle {
    font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 2vw, 1.1rem);
    color: var(--c-muted);
    max-width: 540px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  /* ─── FILTROS ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .filter-bar {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 10px;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-bottom: 48px;
  }

  .filter-btn {
    padding: 8px 20px;
    border-radius: 100px;
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    background: var(--c-surface);
    color: var(--c-muted);
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: var(--transition);
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }

  .filter-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
    color: var(--c-text);
  }

  .filter-btn.active {
    background: var(--c-accent);
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
    color: #000;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  /* ─── GRID ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .gallery-grid {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 20px;
    max-width: 1440px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  /* ─── CARD ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .gallery-card {
    background: var(--c-card-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform var(--transition), box-shadow var(--transition), border-color var(--transition);
    will-change: transform;
    animation: cardReveal 0.5s ease both;
  }

  .gallery-card:nth-child(1)  { animation-delay: 0.02s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(2)  { animation-delay: 0.04s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(3)  { animation-delay: 0.06s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(4)  { animation-delay: 0.08s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(5)  { animation-delay: 0.10s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(6)  { animation-delay: 0.12s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(7)  { animation-delay: 0.14s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(8)  { animation-delay: 0.16s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(n+9) { animation-delay: 0.18s }

  @keyframes cardReveal {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px) scale(0.97); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
  }

  .gallery-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px) scale(1.01);
    box-shadow: 0 24px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 0 1px var(--c-accent);
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
  }

  .gallery-card.hidden {
    display: none;
  }

  /* ─── IMAGEN ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-image-wrap {
    position: relative;
    aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .card-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
    transition: transform 0.6s ease;
  }

  .gallery-card:hover .card-image {
    transform: scale(1.07);
  }

  /* ─── OVERLAY ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.85) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 50%, transparent 100%);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity var(--transition);
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-end;
  }

  .gallery-card:hover .card-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  .overlay-content {
    padding: 20px;
    transform: translateY(10px);
    transition: transform var(--transition);
    width: 100%;
  }

  .gallery-card:hover .overlay-content {
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  .overlay-category {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--c-accent);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }

  .overlay-title {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #fff;
    margin: 0 0 14px;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }

  .overlay-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    padding: 8px 16px;
    background: var(--c-accent);
    color: #000;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }

  .overlay-cta:hover {
    background: var(--c-accent2);
  }

  /* ─── CARD FOOTER ─────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-footer {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  }

  .card-number {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--c-accent);
    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
    opacity: 0.7;
  }

  .card-title {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-text);
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .card-tag {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-muted);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }

  /* ─── CONTADOR ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .results-count {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 40px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--c-muted);
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }

  .results-count span {
    color: var(--c-accent);
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 15px;
  }

  /* ─── LIGHTBOX ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .lightbox {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 9999;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 24px;
  }

  .lightbox.open {
    display: flex;
    animation: fadeIn 0.25s ease;
  }

  @keyframes fadeIn {
    from { opacity: 0 }
    to   { opacity: 1 }
  }

  .lightbox-close {
    position: fixed;
    top: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    width: 44px;
    height: 44px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    color: #fff;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: background 0.2s;
    z-index: 10000;
  }

  .lightbox-close:hover {
    background: var(--c-accent);
    color: #000;
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
  }

  .lightbox-inner {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
    max-width: 90vw;
    max-height: 90vh;
    animation: popIn 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) both;
  }

  @keyframes popIn {
    from { transform: scale(0.88); opacity: 0; }
    to   { transform: scale(1);    opacity: 1; }
  }

  .lightbox-img {
    max-width: 100%;
    max-height: 80vh;
    object-fit: contain;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    box-shadow: 0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
  }

  .lightbox-title {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-text);
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    margin: 0;
  }

  /* ─── RESPONSIVE ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  @media (max-width: 640px) {
    .portfolio-section { padding: 48px 16px 64px; }
    .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; }
    .card-footer { padding: 10px 12px; }
    .filter-bar { gap: 8px; }
    .filter-btn { font-size: 11px; padding: 6px 14px; }
    .card-tag { display: none; }
  }
</style>

<script>
  const filterBtns = document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>('.filter-btn');
  const cards      = document.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>('.gallery-card');
  const countEl    = document.getElementById('visible-count');
  const lightbox   = document.getElementById('lightbox')!;
  const lbImg      = document.getElementById('lightbox-img') as HTMLImageElement;
  const lbTitle    = document.getElementById('lightbox-title')!;
  const lbClose    = document.getElementById('lightbox-close')!;

  // ── FILTROS ──
  filterBtns.forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      filterBtns.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
      btn.classList.add('active');
      const filter = btn.dataset.filter ?? 'all';
      let visible = 0;
      cards.forEach(card => {
        const show = filter === 'all' || card.dataset.category === filter;
        card.classList.toggle('hidden', !show);
        if (show) visible++;
      });
      if (countEl) countEl.textContent = String(visible);
    });
  });

  // ── LIGHTBOX ──
  document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>('.overlay-cta').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      e.stopPropagation();
      const src   = btn.dataset.src ?? '';
      const title = btn.dataset.title ?? '';
      lbImg.src        = src;
      lbImg.alt        = title;
      lbTitle.textContent = title;
      lightbox.classList.add('open');
      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    });
  });

  // También al hacer clic en la card completa
  cards.forEach(card => {
    card.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const btn = card.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>('.overlay-cta');
      if (btn) btn.click();
    });
  });

  function closeLightbox() {
    lightbox.classList.remove('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }

  lbClose.addEventListener('click', closeLightbox);
  lightbox.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    if (e.target === lightbox) closeLightbox();
  });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') closeLightbox();
  });
</script>
```
