const images = [
  { src: "/assets/escaleraGruesa.webp",   alt: "Estructura Pesada",      label: "Estructura" },
  { src: "/assets/puertaNegra.webp",       alt: "Portón",                 label: "Portones" },
  { src: "/assets/ventanaBlanca.webp",     alt: "Ventana",                label: "Ventanas" },
  { src: "/assets/gimnasio.webp",          alt: "Gimnasio",               label: "Gimnasio" },
  { src: "/assets/puertaCuadros.webp",     alt: "Puerta Cuadros",         label: "Puertas" },
  { src: "/assets/escaleraFlotante.webp",  alt: "Escalera Flotante",      label: "Escaleras" },
  { src: "/assets/portonConjunto.webp",    alt: "Portón Conjunto",        label: "Conjuntos" },
  { src: "/assets/escaleraAlta.webp",      alt: "Escalera Alta",          label: "Escaleras" },
  { src: "/assets/portonGaraje.webp",      alt: "Portón Garaje",          label: "Garajes" },
];

const services = [
  "Ventanas & Puertas",
  "Portones Eléctricos",
  "Marquesinas & Techos",
  "Escaleras",
  "Rejas & Barandas",
  "Estructura Liviana y Pesada",
];
<section id="servicios" class="services-section">

  <!-- Línea decorativa superior -->
  <div class="section-rule">
    <span class="rule-dot"></span>
    <span class="rule-line"></span>
    <span class="rule-label">Servicios</span>
    <span class="rule-line"></span>
    <span class="rule-dot"></span>
  </div>

  <div class="services-inner">

    <!-- COLUMNA TEXTO -->
    <article class="services-text">
      <p class="services-eyebrow">Fabricación especializada</p>
      <h2 class="services-heading">
        Servicio dentro<br>
        y fuera de<br>
        <em class="services-highlight">Bogotá</em>

      <p class="services-body">
        Fabricamos ventanas, portones eléctricos, marquesinas, puertas de seguridad,
        estructura liviana, pesada, cortinas, techos y todo lo relacionado con la rama.

      <!-- Lista de servicios con icono -->
      <ul class="services-list">
        {services.map(s => (
          <li class="services-list-item">
            <span class="list-bullet" aria-hidden="true"></span>
            {s}
          </li>
        ))}
      </ul>

      <a href="#portfolio" class="services-cta">
        Ver portafolio completo
        <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/>
        </svg>
      </a>

    <!-- COLUMNA GALERÍA -->
    <div class="services-gallery">
      <div class="gallery-mosaic">
        {images.map((img, i) => (
          <div class={`mosaic-cell cell-${i + 1}`}>
            <Image
              src={img.src}
              alt={img.alt}
              width={400}
              height={400}
              class="mosaic-img"
              loading={i < 3 ? "eager" : "lazy"}
            />
            <span class="mosaic-label">{img.label}</span>
        ))}
      </div>

</section>
```

**src/components/OurServices/OurServices.css** (+303 líneas)**

```
 /* ── TOKENS (coherentes con PortfolioGallery) ── */
  :root {
    --s-bg:       #0d1420;
    --s-surface:  #131c2e;
    --s-border:   rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    --s-accent:   #e8a020;
    --s-accent2:  #f0c040;
    --s-text:     #f0f4ff;
    --s-muted:    #7a8499;
    --s-radius:   12px;
    --s-trans:    0.38s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
  }

  /* ── SECTION ── */
  .services-section {
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--s-bg);
    padding: 0 0 100px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* fondo con líneas diagonales */
  .services-section::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(
      -55deg,
      transparent,
      transparent 60px,
      rgba(255,255,255,0.015) 60px,
      rgba(255,255,255,0.015) 61px
    );
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  /* ── RULE ── */
  .section-rule {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
    padding: 40px 5%;
  }

  .rule-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--s-accent);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .rule-line {
    flex: 1;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--s-border);
  }

  .rule-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 0.3em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--s-accent);
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  /* ── INNER LAYOUT ── */
  .services-inner {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.2fr;
    gap: 48px;
    align-items: center;
    max-width: 1300px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 5%;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  /* ── TEXTO ── */
  .services-eyebrow {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--s-muted);
    margin: 0 0 20px;
  }

  .services-heading {
    font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.8rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--s-text);
    line-height: 1.05;
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    margin: 0 0 24px;
  }

  .services-highlight {
    font-style: normal;
    background: linear-gradient(120deg, var(--s-accent), var(--s-accent2));
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
    display: inline-block;
  }

  .services-body {
    font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 1.5vw, 1.05rem);
    color: var(--s-muted);
    line-height: 1.75;
    margin: 0 0 32px;
    max-width: 440px;
  }

  /* Lista */
  .services-list {
    list-style: none;
    margin: 0 0 40px;
    padding: 0;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 12px 24px;
  }

  .services-list-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--s-text);
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }

  .list-bullet {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--s-accent);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* CTA */
  .services-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    padding: 14px 28px;
    background: var(--s-accent);
    color: #000;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none;
    border-radius: 8px;
    transition: background var(--s-trans), transform var(--s-trans);
  }

  .services-cta:hover {
    background: var(--s-accent2);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }

  /* ── GALERÍA MOSAICO ── */
  .services-gallery {
    position: relative;
  }

  .gallery-mosaic {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    grid-template-rows: repeat(3, 160px);
    gap: 8px;
    border-radius: var(--s-radius);
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* Celdas con tamaños variados para romper monotonía */
  .cell-1 { grid-column: 1 / 3; grid-row: 1 / 2; }
  .cell-2 { grid-column: 3 / 4; grid-row: 1 / 3; }
  .cell-3 { grid-column: 1 / 2; grid-row: 2 / 3; }
  .cell-4 { grid-column: 2 / 3; grid-row: 2 / 3; }
  .cell-5 { grid-column: 1 / 2; grid-row: 3 / 4; }
  .cell-6 { grid-column: 2 / 3; grid-row: 3 / 4; }
  .cell-7 { grid-column: 3 / 4; grid-row: 3 / 4; }
  /* celdas 8 y 9 ocultas en desktop (bonus para mobile) */
  .cell-8,
  .cell-9 { display: none; }

  .mosaic-cell {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: 6px;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .mosaic-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
    transition: transform 0.55s ease, filter 0.4s ease;
    filter: brightness(0.85);
  }

  .mosaic-cell:hover .mosaic-img {
    transform: scale(1.08);
    filter: brightness(1);
  }

  /* etiqueta interna */
  .mosaic-label {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 8px;
    left: 8px;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #fff;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.55);
    backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
    padding: 3px 8px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    border-left: 2px solid var(--s-accent);
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(4px);
    transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
  }

  .mosaic-cell:hover .mosaic-label {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  /* Badge flotante */
  .floating-badge {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: -16px;
    left: -20px;
    background: var(--s-accent);
    color: #000;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 14px 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(232,160,32,0.35);
    z-index: 2;
    animation: badgePulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  }

  @keyframes badgePulse {
    0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
    50%       { transform: translateY(-4px); }
  }

  .badge-number {
    font-size: 2rem;
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1;
    letter-spacing: -0.04em;
  }

  .badge-text {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .services-inner {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      gap: 48px;
    }

    .services-heading { font-size: clamp(2rem, 8vw, 3rem); }
    .services-body { max-width: 100%; }

    .gallery-mosaic {
      grid-template-rows: repeat(3, 130px);
    }

    .floating-badge {
      left: auto;
      right: 12px;
      bottom: -20px;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 520px) {
    .services-list { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .gallery-mosaic {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
      grid-template-rows: repeat(3, 100px);
  }
```

**src/components/PortfolioGalleryPage/PortfolioGalleryPage.astro** (+620 líneas)**

```

const imageFiles = [
  'baranda balcon.webp',
  'baranda de seguirdad interna.webp',
  'baranda de seguridad.webp',
  'barandilla de seguridad interna.webp',
  'barandilla Larga.webp',
  'barandilla.webp',
  'barandillaDeSeguridad.webp',
  'cortinaPanPa_Ya.webp',
  'cortinaPopsy.webp',
  'cubierta peatonal.webp',
  'domo cubierta peatonal.webp',
  'domo grande policarbonato.webp',
  'domo paso peatonal.webp',
  'domo.webp',
  'escalera.webp',
  'escaleraAlta.webp',
  'escaleraDelgada.webp',
  'escaleraFlotante.webp',
  'escaleraGruesa.webp',
  'gimnasio.webp',
  'parqueInfantil.webp',
  'porton parte externa.webp',
  'porton.webp',
  'portonConjunto.webp',
  'portonGaraje.webp',
  'puerta.webp',
  'puertaCuadros.webp',
  'puertaNegra.webp',
  'puertas edificio 2.webp',
  'puertaYVentanaDeAluminio.webp',
  'reja de seguirdad.webp',
  'reja de seguridad externa.webp',
  'reja electrica.webp',
  'rejaParaContadorGas.webp',
  'rejaParaContadorLuz.webp',
  'rejaPerimetral.webp',
  'techo.webp',
  'techoDePolicarbonato.webp',
  'techoLargoPolicarbonato.webp',
  'ventanaBlanca.webp',
].sort();

// Categorías para agrupar los productos
const categories = {
  'Barandas & Barandillas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('baranda') || f.toLowerCase().includes('barandilla')),
  'Cortinas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('cortina')),
  'Cubiertas & Domos': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('cubierta') || f.toLowerCase().includes('domo') || f.toLowerCase().includes('techo')),
  'Escaleras': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('escalera')),
  'Portones & Puertas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('porton') || f.toLowerCase().includes('puerta')),
  'Rejas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('reja')),
  'Ventanas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('ventana')),
  'Otros': imageFiles.filter(f =>
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('baranda') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('barandilla') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('cortina') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('cubierta') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('domo') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('techo') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('escalera') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('porton') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('puerta') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('reja') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('ventana')
  ),
};

function titleFromFilename(name: string) {
  return name
    .replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '')
    .replace(/[-_\.]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\b(\w)/g, (s: string) => s.toUpperCase());
}
<section id="portfolio" class="portfolio-section">
  <!-- Header decorativo -->
  <div class="portfolio-header">
    <div class="header-eyebrow">
      <span class="eyebrow-line"></span>
      <span class="eyebrow-text">Nuestro Trabajo</span>
      <span class="eyebrow-line"></span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="portfolio-title">Portafolio</h2>
    <p class="portfolio-subtitle">Soluciones en metal, aluminio y policarbonato con estándares de calidad superiores</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Filtros de categoría -->
  <div class="filter-bar">
    <button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all">Todos</button>
    {Object.keys(categories).map(cat => (
      <button class="filter-btn" data-filter={cat}>{cat}</button>
    ))}
  </div>

  <!-- Galería principal -->
  <div class="gallery-grid" id="gallery">
    {imageFiles.map((file, i) => {
      const category = Object.entries(categories).find(([_, files]) => files.includes(file))?.[0] ?? 'Otros';
      return (
        <article class="gallery-card" data-category={category} data-index={i}>
          <div class="card-image-wrap">
            <Image
              class="card-image"
              src={`/assets/${file}`}
              width={640}
              height={480}
              loading={i < 12 ? "eager" : "lazy"}
              alt={titleFromFilename(file)}
            />
            <div class="card-overlay">
              <div class="overlay-content">
                <span class="overlay-category">{category}</span>
                <h3 class="overlay-title">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
                <button class="overlay-cta" data-src={`/assets/${file}`} data-title={titleFromFilename(file)}>
                  <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                    <path d="M15 3h6v6M9 21H3v-6M21 3l-7 7M3 21l7-7"/>
                  </svg>
                  Ver detalle
                </button>
              </div>
          </div>
          <div class="card-footer">
            <span class="card-number">{String(i + 1).padStart(2, '0')}</span>
            <h3 class="card-title">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
            <span class="card-tag">{category}</span>
          </div>
        </article>
      );
    })}
  </div>

  <!-- Contador de resultados -->
  <div class="results-count">
    <span id="visible-count">{imageFiles.length}</span> productos mostrados
  </div>

<!-- Lightbox -->
<div class="lightbox" id="lightbox" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Vista ampliada">
  <button class="lightbox-close" id="lightbox-close" aria-label="Cerrar">
    <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
      <line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/>
    </svg>
  </button>
  <div class="lightbox-inner">
    <img class="lightbox-img" id="lightbox-img" src="" alt="" />
    <div class="lightbox-info">
      <p class="lightbox-title" id="lightbox-title"></p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
  /* ─── TOKENS ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  :root {
    --c-bg:       #0a0f1a;
    --c-surface:  #111827;
    --c-border:   rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    --c-accent:   #e8a020;
    --c-accent2:  #f0c040;
    --c-text:     #f0f4ff;
    --c-muted:    #6b7280;
    --c-card-bg:  #141b2d;
    --radius:     12px;
    --transition: 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
  }

  /* ─── SECTION ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .portfolio-section {
    width: 100%;
    min-height: 100vh;
    background: var(--c-bg);
    padding: 80px 24px 100px;
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* fondo con patrón de rejilla sutil */
  .portfolio-section::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.025) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.025) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 40px 40px;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
  }

  /* ─── HEADER ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .portfolio-header {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 56px;
  }

  .header-eyebrow {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .eyebrow-line {
    display: block;
    width: 48px;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--c-accent));
  }

  .eyebrow-line:last-child {
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--c-accent), transparent);
  }

  .eyebrow-text {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--c-accent);
  }

  .portfolio-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 5rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--c-text);
    line-height: 1;
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    margin: 0 0 16px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff 40%, var(--c-accent2));
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
  }

  .portfolio-subtitle {
    font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 2vw, 1.1rem);
    color: var(--c-muted);
    max-width: 540px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  /* ─── FILTROS ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .filter-bar {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 10px;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-bottom: 48px;
  }

  .filter-btn {
    padding: 8px 20px;
    border-radius: 100px;
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    background: var(--c-surface);
    color: var(--c-muted);
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: var(--transition);
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }

  .filter-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
    color: var(--c-text);
  }

  .filter-btn.active {
    background: var(--c-accent);
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
    color: #000;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  /* ─── GRID ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .gallery-grid {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 20px;
    max-width: 1440px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  /* ─── CARD ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .gallery-card {
    background: var(--c-card-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform var(--transition), box-shadow var(--transition), border-color var(--transition);
    will-change: transform;
    animation: cardReveal 0.5s ease both;
  }

  .gallery-card:nth-child(1)  { animation-delay: 0.02s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(2)  { animation-delay: 0.04s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(3)  { animation-delay: 0.06s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(4)  { animation-delay: 0.08s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(5)  { animation-delay: 0.10s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(6)  { animation-delay: 0.12s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(7)  { animation-delay: 0.14s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(8)  { animation-delay: 0.16s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(n+9) { animation-delay: 0.18s }

  @keyframes cardReveal {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px) scale(0.97); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
  }

  .gallery-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px) scale(1.01);
    box-shadow: 0 24px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 0 1px var(--c-accent);
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
  }

  .gallery-card.hidden {
    display: none;
  }

  /* ─── IMAGEN ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-image-wrap {
    position: relative;
    aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .card-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
    transition: transform 0.6s ease;
  }

  .gallery-card:hover .card-image {
    transform: scale(1.07);
  }

  /* ─── OVERLAY ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.85) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 50%, transparent 100%);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity var(--transition);
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-end;
  }

  .gallery-card:hover .card-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  .overlay-content {
    padding: 20px;
    transform: translateY(10px);
    transition: transform var(--transition);
    width: 100%;
  }

  .gallery-card:hover .overlay-content {
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  .overlay-category {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--c-accent);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }

  .overlay-title {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #fff;
    margin: 0 0 14px;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }

  .overlay-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    padding: 8px 16px;
    background: var(--c-accent);
    color: #000;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }

  .overlay-cta:hover {
    background: var(--c-accent2);
  }

  /* ─── CARD FOOTER ─────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-footer {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  }

  .card-number {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--c-accent);
    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
    opacity: 0.7;
  }

  .card-title {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-text);
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .card-tag {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-muted);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }

  /* ─── CONTADOR ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .results-count {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 40px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--c-muted);
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }

  .results-count span {
    color: var(--c-accent);
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 15px;
  }

  /* ─── LIGHTBOX ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .lightbox {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 9999;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 24px;
  }

  .lightbox.open {
    display: flex;
    animation: fadeIn 0.25s ease;
  }

  @keyframes fadeIn {
    from { opacity: 0 }
    to   { opacity: 1 }
  }

  .lightbox-close {
    position: fixed;
    top: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    width: 44px;
    height: 44px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    color: #fff;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: background 0.2s;
    z-index: 10000;
  }

  .lightbox-close:hover {
    background: var(--c-accent);
    color: #000;
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
  }

  .lightbox-inner {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
    max-width: 90vw;
    max-height: 90vh;
    animation: popIn 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) both;
  }

  @keyframes popIn {
    from { transform: scale(0.88); opacity: 0; }
    to   { transform: scale(1);    opacity: 1; }
  }

  .lightbox-img {
    max-width: 100%;
    max-height: 80vh;
    object-fit: contain;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    box-shadow: 0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
  }

  .lightbox-title {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-text);
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    margin: 0;
  }

  /* ─── RESPONSIVE ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  @media (max-width: 640px) {
    .portfolio-section { padding: 48px 16px 64px; }
    .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; }
    .card-footer { padding: 10px 12px; }
    .filter-bar { gap: 8px; }
    .filter-btn { font-size: 11px; padding: 6px 14px; }
    .card-tag { display: none; }
  }
</style>

<script>
  const filterBtns = document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>('.filter-btn');
  const cards      = document.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>('.gallery-card');
  const countEl    = document.getElementById('visible-count');
  const lightbox   = document.getElementById('lightbox')!;
  const lbImg      = document.getElementById('lightbox-img') as HTMLImageElement;
  const lbTitle    = document.getElementById('lightbox-title')!;
  const lbClose    = document.getElementById('lightbox-close')!;

  // ── FILTROS ──
  filterBtns.forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      filterBtns.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
      btn.classList.add('active');
      const filter = btn.dataset.filter ?? 'all';
      let visible = 0;
      cards.forEach(card => {
        const show = filter === 'all' || card.dataset.category === filter;
        card.classList.toggle('hidden', !show);
        if (show) visible++;
      });
      if (countEl) countEl.textContent = String(visible);
    });
  });

  // ── LIGHTBOX ──
  document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>('.overlay-cta').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      e.stopPropagation();
      const src   = btn.dataset.src ?? '';
      const title = btn.dataset.title ?? '';
      lbImg.src        = src;
      lbImg.alt        = title;
      lbTitle.textContent = title;
      lightbox.classList.add('open');
      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    });
  });

  // También al hacer clic en la card completa
  cards.forEach(card => {
    card.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const btn = card.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>('.overlay-cta');
      if (btn) btn.click();
    });
  });

  function closeLightbox() {
    lightbox.classList.remove('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }

  lbClose.addEventListener('click', closeLightbox);
  lightbox.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    if (e.target === lightbox) closeLightbox();
  });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') closeLightbox();
  });
</script>
```

<style>
  :root {
    --c-bg:      #0a0f1a;
    --c-surface: #111827;
    --c-card:    #141b2d;
    --c-border:  rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    --c-accent:  #e8a020;
    --c-accent2: #f0c040;
    --c-text:    #f0f4ff;
    --c-muted:   #6b7280;
    --c-radius:  14px;
    --c-trans:   0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
  }

  /* ── SECTION ── */
  .contact-section {
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--c-bg);
    padding: 80px 5% 80px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* patrón punteado de fondo */
  .contact-section::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background-image: radial-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 28px 28px;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  /* ── HEADER ── */
  .contact-header {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 64px;
  }

  .header-pill {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #000;
    background: var(--c-accent);
    padding: 5px 16px;
    border-radius: 100px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .contact-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 5vw, 4rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--c-text);
    line-height: 1.1;
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    margin: 0 0 16px;
  }

  .title-brand {
    background: linear-gradient(120deg, var(--c-accent), var(--c-accent2));
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
    display: inline-block;
  }

  .contact-subtitle {
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: var(--c-muted);
    margin: 0;
  }

  /* ── GRID ── */
  .contact-grid {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr;
    gap: 32px;
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto 48px;
    align-items: start;
  }

  /* ── INFO COLUMN ── */
  .info-column {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .info-card {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
    background: var(--c-card);
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    border-radius: var(--c-radius);
    padding: 18px 20px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: border-color var(--c-trans), transform var(--c-trans), box-shadow var(--c-trans);
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .info-card:hover {
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
    transform: translateX(4px);
    box-shadow: -4px 0 0 var(--c-accent), 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  }

  .info-icon {
    width: 44px;
    height: 44px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    background: rgba(232,160,32,0.12);
    border: 1px solid rgba(232,160,32,0.25);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--c-accent);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    transition: background var(--c-trans);
  }

  .info-card:hover .info-icon {
    background: var(--c-accent);
    color: #000;
  }

  .info-content {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 2px;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .info-label {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--c-muted);
  }

  .info-value {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-text);
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
  }

  .info-sub {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--c-muted);
  }

  .info-arrow {
    color: var(--c-muted);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    transition: color var(--c-trans), transform var(--c-trans);
  }

  .info-card:hover .info-arrow {
    color: var(--c-accent);
    transform: translateX(4px);
  }

  /* WhatsApp CTA */
  .whatsapp-btn {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 10px;
    padding: 16px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    background: #25d366;
    color: #fff;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 14px;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    border-radius: var(--c-radius);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: background var(--c-trans), transform var(--c-trans);
  }

  .whatsapp-btn:hover {
    background: #1ebe57;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }

  /* ── MAPA ── */
  .map-column {
    position: relative;
  }

  .map-wrap {
    position: relative;
    border-radius: var(--c-radius);
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    box-shadow: 0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
  }

  .map-iframe {
    width: 100%;
    height: 520px;
    display: block;
    border: none;
    filter: grayscale(25%) contrast(1.05);
  }

  /* badge sobre el mapa */
  .map-badge {
    position: absolute;
    top: 16px;
    left: 16px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: var(--c-card);
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 8px 14px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-text);
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  }

  /* ── FOOTNOTE ── */
  .contact-footnote {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--c-muted);
    margin: 0;
    padding-top: 16px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
  @media (max-width: 860px) {
    .contact-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .map-iframe {
      height: 340px;
    }

    .map-column {
      order: -1;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 480px) {
    .contact-section { padding: 56px 4% 56px; }
    .contact-title { font-size: 2rem; }
    .info-value { font-size: 13px; }
  }
</style>
```

const images = [
  { src: "/assets/escaleraGruesa.webp",   alt: "Estructura Pesada",      label: "Estructura" },
  { src: "/assets/puertaNegra.webp",       alt: "Portón",                 label: "Portones" },
  { src: "/assets/ventanaBlanca.webp",     alt: "Ventana",                label: "Ventanas" },
  { src: "/assets/gimnasio.webp",          alt: "Gimnasio",               label: "Gimnasio" },
  { src: "/assets/puertaCuadros.webp",     alt: "Puerta Cuadros",         label: "Puertas" },
  { src: "/assets/escaleraFlotante.webp",  alt: "Escalera Flotante",      label: "Escaleras" },
  { src: "/assets/portonConjunto.webp",    alt: "Portón Conjunto",        label: "Conjuntos" },
  { src: "/assets/escaleraAlta.webp",      alt: "Escalera Alta",          label: "Escaleras" },
  { src: "/assets/portonGaraje.webp",      alt: "Portón Garaje",          label: "Garajes" },
];

const services = [
  "Ventanas & Puertas",
  "Portones Eléctricos",
  "Marquesinas & Techos",
  "Escaleras",
  "Rejas & Barandas",
  "Estructura Liviana y Pesada",
];
<section id="servicios" class="services-section">

  <!-- Línea decorativa superior -->
  <div class="section-rule">
    <span class="rule-dot"></span>
    <span class="rule-line"></span>
    <span class="rule-label">Servicios</span>
    <span class="rule-line"></span>
    <span class="rule-dot"></span>
  </div>

  <div class="services-inner">

    <!-- COLUMNA TEXTO -->
    <article class="services-text">
      <p class="services-eyebrow">Fabricación especializada</p>
      <h2 class="services-heading">
        Servicio dentro<br>
        y fuera de<br>
        <em class="services-highlight">Bogotá</em>

      <p class="services-body">
        Fabricamos ventanas, portones eléctricos, marquesinas, puertas de seguridad,
        estructura liviana, pesada, cortinas, techos y todo lo relacionado con la rama.

      <!-- Lista de servicios con icono -->
      <ul class="services-list">
        {services.map(s => (
          <li class="services-list-item">
            <span class="list-bullet" aria-hidden="true"></span>
            {s}
          </li>
        ))}
      </ul>

      <a href="#portfolio" class="services-cta">
        Ver portafolio completo
        <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/>
        </svg>
      </a>

    <!-- COLUMNA GALERÍA -->
    <div class="services-gallery">
      <div class="gallery-mosaic">
        {images.map((img, i) => (
          <div class={`mosaic-cell cell-${i + 1}`}>
            <Image
              src={img.src}
              alt={img.alt}
              width={400}
              height={400}
              class="mosaic-img"
              loading={i < 3 ? "eager" : "lazy"}
            />
            <span class="mosaic-label">{img.label}</span>
        ))}
      </div>

</section>

**src/components/OurServices/OurServices.css** (+303 líneas)**

```
 /* ── TOKENS (coherentes con PortfolioGallery) ── */
  :root {
    --s-bg:       #0d1420;
    --s-surface:  #131c2e;
    --s-border:   rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    --s-accent:   #e8a020;
    --s-accent2:  #f0c040;
    --s-text:     #f0f4ff;
    --s-muted:    #7a8499;
    --s-radius:   12px;
    --s-trans:    0.38s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
  }

  /* ── SECTION ── */
  .services-section {
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--s-bg);
    padding: 0 0 100px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* fondo con líneas diagonales */
  .services-section::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(
      -55deg,
      transparent,
      transparent 60px,
      rgba(255,255,255,0.015) 60px,
      rgba(255,255,255,0.015) 61px
    );
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  /* ── RULE ── */
  .section-rule {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
    padding: 40px 5%;
  }

  .rule-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--s-accent);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .rule-line {
    flex: 1;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--s-border);
  }

  .rule-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 0.3em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--s-accent);
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  /* ── INNER LAYOUT ── */
  .services-inner {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.2fr;
    gap: 48px;
    align-items: center;
    max-width: 1300px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 5%;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  /* ── TEXTO ── */
  .services-eyebrow {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--s-muted);
    margin: 0 0 20px;
  }

  .services-heading {
    font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.8rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--s-text);
    line-height: 1.05;
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    margin: 0 0 24px;
  }

  .services-highlight {
    font-style: normal;
    background: linear-gradient(120deg, var(--s-accent), var(--s-accent2));
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
    display: inline-block;
  }

  .services-body {
    font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 1.5vw, 1.05rem);
    color: var(--s-muted);
    line-height: 1.75;
    margin: 0 0 32px;
    max-width: 440px;
  }

  /* Lista */
  .services-list {
    list-style: none;
    margin: 0 0 40px;
    padding: 0;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 12px 24px;
  }

  .services-list-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--s-text);
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }

  .list-bullet {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--s-accent);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* CTA */
  .services-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    padding: 14px 28px;
    background: var(--s-accent);
    color: #000;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none;
    border-radius: 8px;
    transition: background var(--s-trans), transform var(--s-trans);
  }

  .services-cta:hover {
    background: var(--s-accent2);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }

  /* ── GALERÍA MOSAICO ── */
  .services-gallery {
    position: relative;
  }

  .gallery-mosaic {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    grid-template-rows: repeat(3, 160px);
    gap: 8px;
    border-radius: var(--s-radius);
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* Celdas con tamaños variados para romper monotonía */
  .cell-1 { grid-column: 1 / 3; grid-row: 1 / 2; }
  .cell-2 { grid-column: 3 / 4; grid-row: 1 / 3; }
  .cell-3 { grid-column: 1 / 2; grid-row: 2 / 3; }
  .cell-4 { grid-column: 2 / 3; grid-row: 2 / 3; }
  .cell-5 { grid-column: 1 / 2; grid-row: 3 / 4; }
  .cell-6 { grid-column: 2 / 3; grid-row: 3 / 4; }
  .cell-7 { grid-column: 3 / 4; grid-row: 3 / 4; }
  /* celdas 8 y 9 ocultas en desktop (bonus para mobile) */
  .cell-8,
  .cell-9 { display: none; }

  .mosaic-cell {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: 6px;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .mosaic-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
    transition: transform 0.55s ease, filter 0.4s ease;
    filter: brightness(0.85);
  }

  .mosaic-cell:hover .mosaic-img {
    transform: scale(1.08);
    filter: brightness(1);
  }

  /* etiqueta interna */
  .mosaic-label {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 8px;
    left: 8px;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #fff;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.55);
    backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
    padding: 3px 8px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    border-left: 2px solid var(--s-accent);
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(4px);
    transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
  }

  .mosaic-cell:hover .mosaic-label {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  /* Badge flotante */
  .floating-badge {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: -16px;
    left: -20px;
    background: var(--s-accent);
    color: #000;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 14px 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(232,160,32,0.35);
    z-index: 2;
    animation: badgePulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  }

  @keyframes badgePulse {
    0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
    50%       { transform: translateY(-4px); }
  }

  .badge-number {
    font-size: 2rem;
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1;
    letter-spacing: -0.04em;
  }

  .badge-text {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .services-inner {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      gap: 48px;
    }

    .services-heading { font-size: clamp(2rem, 8vw, 3rem); }
    .services-body { max-width: 100%; }

    .gallery-mosaic {
      grid-template-rows: repeat(3, 130px);
    }

    .floating-badge {
      left: auto;
      right: 12px;
      bottom: -20px;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 520px) {
    .services-list { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .gallery-mosaic {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
      grid-template-rows: repeat(3, 100px);
  }
```

**src/components/PortfolioGalleryPage/PortfolioGalleryPage.astro** (+620 líneas)**

```

const imageFiles = [
  'baranda balcon.webp',
  'baranda de seguirdad interna.webp',
  'baranda de seguridad.webp',
  'barandilla de seguridad interna.webp',
  'barandilla Larga.webp',
  'barandilla.webp',
  'barandillaDeSeguridad.webp',
  'cortinaPanPa_Ya.webp',
  'cortinaPopsy.webp',
  'cubierta peatonal.webp',
  'domo cubierta peatonal.webp',
  'domo grande policarbonato.webp',
  'domo paso peatonal.webp',
  'domo.webp',
  'escalera.webp',
  'escaleraAlta.webp',
  'escaleraDelgada.webp',
  'escaleraFlotante.webp',
  'escaleraGruesa.webp',
  'gimnasio.webp',
  'parqueInfantil.webp',
  'porton parte externa.webp',
  'porton.webp',
  'portonConjunto.webp',
  'portonGaraje.webp',
  'puerta.webp',
  'puertaCuadros.webp',
  'puertaNegra.webp',
  'puertas edificio 2.webp',
  'puertaYVentanaDeAluminio.webp',
  'reja de seguirdad.webp',
  'reja de seguridad externa.webp',
  'reja electrica.webp',
  'rejaParaContadorGas.webp',
  'rejaParaContadorLuz.webp',
  'rejaPerimetral.webp',
  'techo.webp',
  'techoDePolicarbonato.webp',
  'techoLargoPolicarbonato.webp',
  'ventanaBlanca.webp',
].sort();

// Categorías para agrupar los productos
const categories = {
  'Barandas & Barandillas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('baranda') || f.toLowerCase().includes('barandilla')),
  'Cortinas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('cortina')),
  'Cubiertas & Domos': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('cubierta') || f.toLowerCase().includes('domo') || f.toLowerCase().includes('techo')),
  'Escaleras': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('escalera')),
  'Portones & Puertas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('porton') || f.toLowerCase().includes('puerta')),
  'Rejas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('reja')),
  'Ventanas': imageFiles.filter(f => f.toLowerCase().includes('ventana')),
  'Otros': imageFiles.filter(f =>
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('baranda') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('barandilla') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('cortina') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('cubierta') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('domo') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('techo') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('escalera') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('porton') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('puerta') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('reja') &&
    !f.toLowerCase().includes('ventana')
  ),
};

function titleFromFilename(name: string) {
  return name
    .replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '')
    .replace(/[-_\.]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\b(\w)/g, (s: string) => s.toUpperCase());
}
<section id="portfolio" class="portfolio-section">
  <!-- Header decorativo -->
  <div class="portfolio-header">
    <div class="header-eyebrow">
      <span class="eyebrow-line"></span>
      <span class="eyebrow-text">Nuestro Trabajo</span>
      <span class="eyebrow-line"></span>
    </div>
    <h2 class="portfolio-title">Portafolio</h2>
    <p class="portfolio-subtitle">Soluciones en metal, aluminio y policarbonato con estándares de calidad superiores</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Filtros de categoría -->
  <div class="filter-bar">
    <button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all">Todos</button>
    {Object.keys(categories).map(cat => (
      <button class="filter-btn" data-filter={cat}>{cat}</button>
    ))}
  </div>

  <!-- Galería principal -->
  <div class="gallery-grid" id="gallery">
    {imageFiles.map((file, i) => {
      const category = Object.entries(categories).find(([_, files]) => files.includes(file))?.[0] ?? 'Otros';
      return (
        <article class="gallery-card" data-category={category} data-index={i}>
          <div class="card-image-wrap">
            <Image
              class="card-image"
              src={`/assets/${file}`}
              width={640}
              height={480}
              loading={i < 12 ? "eager" : "lazy"}
              alt={titleFromFilename(file)}
            />
            <div class="card-overlay">
              <div class="overlay-content">
                <span class="overlay-category">{category}</span>
                <h3 class="overlay-title">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
                <button class="overlay-cta" data-src={`/assets/${file}`} data-title={titleFromFilename(file)}>
                  <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                    <path d="M15 3h6v6M9 21H3v-6M21 3l-7 7M3 21l7-7"/>
                  </svg>
                  Ver detalle
                </button>
              </div>
          </div>
          <div class="card-footer">
            <span class="card-number">{String(i + 1).padStart(2, '0')}</span>
            <h3 class="card-title">{titleFromFilename(file)}</h3>
            <span class="card-tag">{category}</span>
          </div>
        </article>
      );
    })}
  </div>

  <!-- Contador de resultados -->
  <div class="results-count">
    <span id="visible-count">{imageFiles.length}</span> productos mostrados
  </div>

<!-- Lightbox -->
<div class="lightbox" id="lightbox" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Vista ampliada">
  <button class="lightbox-close" id="lightbox-close" aria-label="Cerrar">
    <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
      <line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/>
    </svg>
  </button>
  <div class="lightbox-inner">
    <img class="lightbox-img" id="lightbox-img" src="" alt="" />
    <div class="lightbox-info">
      <p class="lightbox-title" id="lightbox-title"></p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
  /* ─── TOKENS ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  :root {
    --c-bg:       #0a0f1a;
    --c-surface:  #111827;
    --c-border:   rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    --c-accent:   #e8a020;
    --c-accent2:  #f0c040;
    --c-text:     #f0f4ff;
    --c-muted:    #6b7280;
    --c-card-bg:  #141b2d;
    --radius:     12px;
    --transition: 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
  }

  /* ─── SECTION ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .portfolio-section {
    width: 100%;
    min-height: 100vh;
    background: var(--c-bg);
    padding: 80px 24px 100px;
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* fondo con patrón de rejilla sutil */
  .portfolio-section::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.025) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.025) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 40px 40px;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
  }

  /* ─── HEADER ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .portfolio-header {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 56px;
  }

  .header-eyebrow {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .eyebrow-line {
    display: block;
    width: 48px;
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--c-accent));
  }

  .eyebrow-line:last-child {
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--c-accent), transparent);
  }

  .eyebrow-text {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--c-accent);
  }

  .portfolio-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 5rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--c-text);
    line-height: 1;
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    margin: 0 0 16px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff 40%, var(--c-accent2));
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
  }

  .portfolio-subtitle {
    font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 2vw, 1.1rem);
    color: var(--c-muted);
    max-width: 540px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  /* ─── FILTROS ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .filter-bar {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 10px;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-bottom: 48px;
  }

  .filter-btn {
    padding: 8px 20px;
    border-radius: 100px;
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    background: var(--c-surface);
    color: var(--c-muted);
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: var(--transition);
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }

  .filter-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
    color: var(--c-text);
  }

  .filter-btn.active {
    background: var(--c-accent);
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
    color: #000;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  /* ─── GRID ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .gallery-grid {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 20px;
    max-width: 1440px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  /* ─── CARD ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .gallery-card {
    background: var(--c-card-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform var(--transition), box-shadow var(--transition), border-color var(--transition);
    will-change: transform;
    animation: cardReveal 0.5s ease both;
  }

  .gallery-card:nth-child(1)  { animation-delay: 0.02s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(2)  { animation-delay: 0.04s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(3)  { animation-delay: 0.06s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(4)  { animation-delay: 0.08s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(5)  { animation-delay: 0.10s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(6)  { animation-delay: 0.12s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(7)  { animation-delay: 0.14s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(8)  { animation-delay: 0.16s }
  .gallery-card:nth-child(n+9) { animation-delay: 0.18s }

  @keyframes cardReveal {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px) scale(0.97); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
  }

  .gallery-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px) scale(1.01);
    box-shadow: 0 24px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 0 1px var(--c-accent);
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
  }

  .gallery-card.hidden {
    display: none;
  }

  /* ─── IMAGEN ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-image-wrap {
    position: relative;
    aspect-ratio: 4/3;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .card-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
    transition: transform 0.6s ease;
  }

  .gallery-card:hover .card-image {
    transform: scale(1.07);
  }

  /* ─── OVERLAY ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.85) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 50%, transparent 100%);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity var(--transition);
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-end;
  }

  .gallery-card:hover .card-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  .overlay-content {
    padding: 20px;
    transform: translateY(10px);
    transition: transform var(--transition);
    width: 100%;
  }

  .gallery-card:hover .overlay-content {
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  .overlay-category {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--c-accent);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }

  .overlay-title {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #fff;
    margin: 0 0 14px;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }

  .overlay-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    padding: 8px 16px;
    background: var(--c-accent);
    color: #000;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }

  .overlay-cta:hover {
    background: var(--c-accent2);
  }

  /* ─── CARD FOOTER ─────────────────────────────────────── */
  .card-footer {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--c-border);
  }

  .card-number {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--c-accent);
    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
    opacity: 0.7;
  }

  .card-title {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-text);
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .card-tag {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-muted);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }

  /* ─── CONTADOR ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .results-count {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 40px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--c-muted);
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }

  .results-count span {
    color: var(--c-accent);
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 15px;
  }

  /* ─── LIGHTBOX ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .lightbox {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 9999;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 24px;
  }

  .lightbox.open {
    display: flex;
    animation: fadeIn 0.25s ease;
  }

  @keyframes fadeIn {
    from { opacity: 0 }
    to   { opacity: 1 }
  }

  .lightbox-close {
    position: fixed;
    top: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    width: 44px;
    height: 44px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    color: #fff;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: background 0.2s;
    z-index: 10000;
  }

  .lightbox-close:hover {
    background: var(--c-accent);
    color: #000;
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
  }

  .lightbox-inner {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
    max-width: 90vw;
    max-height: 90vh;
    animation: popIn 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) both;
  }

  @keyframes popIn {
    from { transform: scale(0.88); opacity: 0; }
    to   { transform: scale(1);    opacity: 1; }
  }

  .lightbox-img {
    max-width: 100%;
    max-height: 80vh;
    object-fit: contain;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    box-shadow: 0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
  }

  .lightbox-title {
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-text);
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    margin: 0;
  }

  /* ─── RESPONSIVE ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  @media (max-width: 640px) {
    .portfolio-section { padding: 48px 16px 64px; }
    .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; }
    .card-footer { padding: 10px 12px; }
    .filter-bar { gap: 8px; }
    .filter-btn { font-size: 11px; padding: 6px 14px; }
    .card-tag { display: none; }
  }
</style>

<script>
  const filterBtns = document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>('.filter-btn');
  const cards      = document.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>('.gallery-card');
  const countEl    = document.getElementById('visible-count');
  const lightbox   = document.getElementById('lightbox')!;
  const lbImg      = document.getElementById('lightbox-img') as HTMLImageElement;
  const lbTitle    = document.getElementById('lightbox-title')!;
  const lbClose    = document.getElementById('lightbox-close')!;

  // ── FILTROS ──
  filterBtns.forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      filterBtns.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
      btn.classList.add('active');
      const filter = btn.dataset.filter ?? 'all';
      let visible = 0;
      cards.forEach(card => {
        const show = filter === 'all' || card.dataset.category === filter;
        card.classList.toggle('hidden', !show);
        if (show) visible++;
      });
      if (countEl) countEl.textContent = String(visible);
    });
  });

  // ── LIGHTBOX ──
  document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>('.overlay-cta').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      e.stopPropagation();
      const src   = btn.dataset.src ?? '';
      const title = btn.dataset.title ?? '';
      lbImg.src        = src;
      lbImg.alt        = title;
      lbTitle.textContent = title;
      lightbox.classList.add('open');
      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    });
  });

  // También al hacer clic en la card completa
  cards.forEach(card => {
    card.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const btn = card.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>('.overlay-cta');
      if (btn) btn.click();
    });
  });

  function closeLightbox() {
    lightbox.classList.remove('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }

  lbClose.addEventListener('click', closeLightbox);
  lightbox.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    if (e.target === lightbox) closeLightbox();
  });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') closeLightbox();
  });
</script>
```

</section>

<style>
  :root {
    --c-bg:      #0a0f1a;
    --c-surface: #111827;
    --c-card:    #141b2d;
    --c-border:  rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    --c-accent:  #e8a020;
    --c-accent2: #f0c040;
    --c-text:    #f0f4ff;
    --c-muted:   #6b7280;
    --c-radius:  14px;
    --c-trans:   0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
  }

  /* ── SECTION ── */
  .contact-section {
    width: 100%;
    background: var(--c-bg);
    padding: 80px 5% 80px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* patrón punteado de fondo */
  .contact-section::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background-image: radial-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.04) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 28px 28px;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  /* ── HEADER ── */
  .contact-header {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 64px;
  }

  .header-pill {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #000;
    background: var(--c-accent);
    padding: 5px 16px;
    border-radius: 100px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .contact-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 5vw, 4rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--c-text);
    line-height: 1.1;
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    margin: 0 0 16px;
  }

  .title-brand {
    background: linear-gradient(120deg, var(--c-accent), var(--c-accent2));
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
    display: inline-block;
  }

  .contact-subtitle {
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: var(--c-muted);
    margin: 0;
  }

  /* ── GRID ── */
  .contact-grid {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr;
    gap: 32px;
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto 48px;
    align-items: start;
  }

  /* ── INFO COLUMN ── */
  .info-column {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .info-card {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
    background: var(--c-card);
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    border-radius: var(--c-radius);
    padding: 18px 20px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: border-color var(--c-trans), transform var(--c-trans), box-shadow var(--c-trans);
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .info-card:hover {
    border-color: var(--c-accent);
    transform: translateX(4px);
    box-shadow: -4px 0 0 var(--c-accent), 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  }

  .info-icon {
    width: 44px;
    height: 44px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    background: rgba(232,160,32,0.12);
    border: 1px solid rgba(232,160,32,0.25);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--c-accent);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    transition: background var(--c-trans);
  }

  .info-card:hover .info-icon {
    background: var(--c-accent);
    color: #000;
  }

  .info-content {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 2px;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .info-label {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--c-muted);
  }

  .info-value {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-text);
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
  }

  .info-sub {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--c-muted);
  }

  .info-arrow {
    color: var(--c-muted);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    transition: color var(--c-trans), transform var(--c-trans);
  }

  .info-card:hover .info-arrow {
    color: var(--c-accent);
    transform: translateX(4px);
  }

  /* WhatsApp CTA */
  .whatsapp-btn {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 10px;
    padding: 16px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    background: #25d366;
    color: #fff;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 14px;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    border-radius: var(--c-radius);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: background var(--c-trans), transform var(--c-trans);
  }

  .whatsapp-btn:hover {
    background: #1ebe57;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }

  /* ── MAPA ── */
  .map-column {
    position: relative;
  }

  .map-wrap {
    position: relative;
    border-radius: var(--c-radius);
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    box-shadow: 0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
  }

  .map-iframe {
    width: 100%;
    height: 520px;
    display: block;
    border: none;
    filter: grayscale(25%) contrast(1.05);
  }

  /* badge sobre el mapa */
  .map-badge {
    position: absolute;
    top: 16px;
    left: 16px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: var(--c-card);
    border: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 8px 14px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--c-text);
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  }

  /* ── FOOTNOTE ── */
  .contact-footnote {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--c-muted);
    margin: 0;
    padding-top: 16px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--c-border);
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
  @media (max-width: 860px) {
    .contact-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .map-iframe {
      height: 340px;
    }

    .map-column {
      order: -1;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 480px) {
    .contact-section { padding: 56px 4% 56px; }
    .contact-title { font-size: 2rem; }
    .info-value { font-size: 13px; }
  }
</style>
```

  { src: "/assets/escaleraGruesa.webp",   alt: "Estructura Pesada",      label: "Estructura" },
  { src: "/assets/puertaNegra.webp",       alt: "Portón",                 label: "Portones" },

  "Ventanas & Puertas",

<section id="servicios" class="services-section">

  <!-- Línea decorativa superior -->
  <div class="section-rule">
    <span class="rule-dot"></span>
    <span class="rule-line"></span>
    <span class="rule-label">Servicios</span>
    <span class="rule-line"></span>
    <span class="rule-dot"></span>
  </div>

  <div class="services-inner">

    <!-- COLUMNA TEXTO -->
    <article class="services-text">
      <p class="services-eyebrow">Fabricación especializada</p>
      <h2 class="services-heading">
        Servicio dentro<br>
        y fuera de<br>

      <p class="services-body">
        Fabricamos ventanas, portones eléctricos, marquesinas, puertas de seguridad,

      <!-- Lista de servicios con icono -->

        {services.map(s => (

            <Image
              src={img.src}
              alt={img.alt}
              width={400}
              height={400}
              class="mosaic-img"
              loading={i < 3 ? "eager" : "lazy"}
            />
            <span class="mosaic-label">{img.label}</span>
        ))}
      </div>

</section>
